name: Congresswoman Malliotakis
subject: We Need to Hit the Ground Running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York
body:
It's Time to Work

|
---

Friend -

It's time to hit the ground running and hold the **Biden Administration ACCOUNTABLE!**

For the past two years, President Biden has gone unchecked with a Democrat-controlled Congress.

That ends **NOW.**

With a **Republican Majority in the House,** we now have the means to serve as a backstop to their radical agenda.

**We are excited to get started, and we need your help now more than ever.**

| **CHIP IN TO HELP HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE**
---

Holding President Biden accountable for his failed presidency is going to take all of us.

**We need grassroots supporters just like you, throughout NY-11 and throughout the country, to step up and help our mission.**

You sent me to congress to be the conservative fighter for NY-11. I plan to be exactly that.

Thank you,

Nicole Malliotakis

[](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=4d704575f74d4e3aac70c4212b8a38ad&_e=w2iTN3UPZA-xEWF8qZ8ya0UUW53cMZ-JsPUNxoF23dRMCCeeLKml67mT5ZRvO9XNAtvs64d3nzXbL6NsfT6CE7HwSv5AD-QBwpUUKDtTudqZUKHvr_vj1mQVy3iHznPdMXz9XLqt0vf2ZZmB4YZ4kqrCFXNyWhvaO4mA7JTfszPElE_sBYL75odQiCusEgCR7gCdlNQDlrKElgr5_l0SJXF6CbzOOzcQzFYViecz7lg%3D) [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=4d704575f74d4e3aac70c4212b8a38ad&_e=w2iTN3UPZA-xEWF8qZ8yawjNa8mi_WAHt4WzhVkQaUGkkREAywuvVz1aGUiPW6_IJ53w5ICtK0PyE_7B4NPLRlsXrLHsWP1dn7tuPgtQzKXlHlq1PWtX-fziRX7PNOv1sPzw8nKO0Eqw7uziFXhCO7Kiu1hkCyiE5PbvHt_pT8EeaNNkpy59Ge695ZUlKQa44EGy8aawtdsjR6VfmIqAIw%3D%3D) [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=4d704575f74d4e3aac70c4212b8a38ad&_e=w2iTN3UPZA-xEWF8qZ8ya22JRttTOvsD0kGw9utwhjoRKSei-6bKZGe3_76ZBPWT_tJvf7edbdp9pCzMD4ZYc3snWfe7huvi6otwQn4fJsgpNRlH0SOvVyNkk8NrJtjGm5QUepUjHCmWs16y1_9Qfe1zR947zAGKzvPdmTirDe5IWjp5vo80MmtYwGzpJo4ujApTtLzUTyIjDJIr4HbQ5K61gXVW4H2iUaC0iR94lgg%3D)

|
**A No-Nonsense Leader for Congress.**

* * *

_Congresswoman Malliotakis is the daughter of immigrants, her father from Greece and her mother a Cuban exile of the Castro dictatorship.

She is currently the only Republican member of Congress representing New York City and the only Hispanic Republican elected official citywide._

| Paid for by Nicole for New York

Nicole for New York (Federal)
P.O. Box 60487
Staten Island, NY 10306

subject: Eight Days Left!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, inc
body:
We have just eight days left before election day and I NEED your help. | | | |
---
| | | [Contribute](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=d5b959fec6&e=3cd8121505 "Contribute")
---
|
#### We are making big waves in the 4th district
# We Have Just Eight Days Left!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=84dbc7d97f&e=3cd8121505)
---
|
---
|
---
|
### Rally with us!
We have just eight days left before the special election! Tuesday, February 21 is election day, and we need a big showing!

Have you voted yet?

If you haven't, I NEED you to head to the polls now and get your vote in before election day.

We have all the momentum we need to win; it's just about getting the conservatives to the polls now.

We have put in the hard work, and my team has worked tirelessly. If you need any help finding your polling location, head to your County Registrar's website to find your location.

With only eight days left before election day, we also need help getting the word out. Can you donate just a few hours of your time to make sure we turn this seat red?

We NEED patriots like you to door knock and make phone calls in the district to get out the vote! If you are interested in helping, please email us at info@benjamin4congress.com. We need to get the word out, and we can't do it without you.

We would also like to invite you again to our Get Out the Vote Rally. Kim Klacik will be our guest speaker, and we NEED our base energized to head to the polls. **Click the image for the rally to sign up!**

---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| This week we also rolled out an impressive list of endorsements.

Attorney General Jason Miyares
Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears
Dr. Ben Carson
Kim Klacik

All endorsed our campaign this week.

Follow us on social media for the next slate of endorsements.
---
| [ ](https://benjamin4congress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bf85a44dd108635a55466e64b&id=0ccb186fdf&e=3cd8121505)
---
| **Check your voting location by clicking the "Vote Now" button.**

All we need if for each of our supporters to bring 5 friends to the polls with them to vote and we will win.

It is crunch time and we can't do it without you!
---

name: Kevin
subject: We made history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cramer for Senate
body:
I defeated the Democrat incumbent to become the first Republican to hold this Senate seat in my lifetime. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8mGQo7o-i3JmTmEnWDfRwlDRy3Zdno4NESr64KwyibiPz8V3G6YBKhs4fX490bU2e6sMGxSpdgWKTiJmz7Q27ZOpEdNFSZDomYeDVr8bwTsJDFanV2ZISPpNXtJPSf584dQMfHOiIphFgyty_coWEzc%3D)
---
Peter,

My name is Kevin Cramer. I am an America First Republican and **conservative warrior who flipped a critical Senate seat from the Democrats in 2018** -_becoming the first Republican to hold this North Dakota seat in my lifetime._

The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America and try to unseat any steadfast conservative who stands in their way. **And since I took this seat from the radical Left...**

**I am the Democrats’ TOP TARGET in 2024.**
[**STAND WITH KEVIN**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8pkS_mfr9shD2eoynpY--g6pajYVxuxTamdLFOmu-uAVbTaDxuZuUATgjp3qfLcqnRrW0XxeiNZpdnSr89n1zafIeJOsQRbaujJypKYZLdkgaNgj9ynuYA0Qjy86j1Q6yhP0ApGOpslj3QjLy4_JWq8%3D) [**RESTORE A GOP MAJORITY**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8mkyhnOt6NXn38Qac8pwHGOyUXFTdS6q8FyChLF7PSGcnFaggNOrQYbZPrzXIrhPIVeNKGCgOB1kJVId4FGqQax6YrNiz_5_CQGomdaaTlNLMIhehqRyeS8j4zeVjfCNXf07wEI993T0t96Nn32Ccio%3D)
This pivotal **2024 Election** for control of the U.S. Senate is about a future **that preserves our American traditions of freedom and prosperity** _and honors our history and our North Dakota way of life._

For me, that life began in Rolla and then on to Kindred, North Dakota, where I was raised and started my education, which I continued at Concordia College in Minnesota and the University of Mary in Bismarck, where my family and I now call home.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8rk441R5N8xMpaemnoyxyxzMrG-1PVsFlHv17kGYxW1lyEV3CM6znW8VR03_8xak7ubxV7lmQwJM1wgz2jnREN6yV1cr0vRiPqTVWkpWX1PxO_DfsuGAzfnDnOxeCv3BFgY4JgqoaRjinuBesPPm71s%3D)

I began serving North Dakota, working my way up to becoming a North Dakota Public Service Commissioner, _**helping oversee the most dynamic energy industry in the nation**_ , leading with free market and limited government principles and commonsense energy policies that benefit our people, **and ensure our energy independence.**

In 2012, I was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives, where I stood up for the right to life, energy independence, the Second Amendment, commonsense healthcare, and federal assistance reform. **I vigorously supported President Donald J. Trump’s America First agenda.**

[**STAND WITH KEVIN**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8u4HI6WSlftRmNHTQL6cGhqCR7mX1e0dwlNAdxk54tdBk-B97ZMzUm09GXIE0yqigqtzjlPRYfvlOcii3jAutSPupD67VkwVUOfXMo8lP2yroI3VM8cjR58y_cWe-4rd9fwsbp0qfBMrnnoSmrJA-h4%3D)
[**RESTORE A GOP MAJORITY**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8skU7e4KQlsorUdDA8u10m1NwcU1mTaCAGyrqrB52Mz1SHOF5lbbMkU0ETtqxTwsx2H8vuDvIy4wxkW4d63OEAAJ6y3dIaXb33MYypl-jC0JJqXYB3YiH9FuUn9Mbx6OLB0cOYXHD34HERpalnTy-rM%3D)
In 2018, I defeated Democrat incumbent Heidi Heitkamp to become _**the first North Dakota Republican to hold my seat in my lifetime**_ \-- and continued fighting for our conservative principles -- first in support of President Trump and, after 2020, **to resist the Biden Democrats’ disastrous agenda of spending, taxes, inflation, failure to protect our border and chaos overseas.**

**And that brings us to today -- the start of the 2024 Senate election cycle-- and our incredible opportunity to win a new GOP Majority in the U.S. Senate that will bring the leftist Democrats’ destructive schemes to a screeching halt.**

[**STAND WITH KEVIN**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8uIQSYwUYwpN6WS0YUjtbZzgpzPOPWIJxwUCtz-TQKITvKx3ww-QmLtYQHXvR6gmPhrpYOjRHZp5RAUzIKPn6e76p9bOZRAz7S2IBuGJkc18l7AuR7x7-cEPwRZzEV8bPV72PoCQ0gESnuyZI078Xxg%3D)
[**RESTORE A GOP MAJORITY**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8tUOt4TOqEXQuvhZjOK5C1fNiqNiIVddglnYCIZvwi2ErkZrQSjFpVvbj6EKGZRDyQfqae8ZkmtKn3zdcOhpFYJe9D4hrcY6g8NmiwCeeM30OHkWx6FOL-xGgTT1YsRPNAODEzJbtYDTvrENkwB0T5A%3D)
Peter, I’m doing everything I can to support the election of common sense conservatives in key U.S. Senate races across the country who will honor our past as we work to save the future -- **[and I need your immediate and indispensable help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a7bfb06a0de44f319637b373bc20f7bb&_e=qeZMb4lVRUBda9YofQCZMgagQelv4ltxBQ7Pmwc6Gphh_md8DkZ6T4OfMLBsx7rEgvO7wFH8mxvZgvRXzb2H9i_cxScciY9eFZ-5hc1aBFnS3GSKDZgdvYU24euizxNIN_VwhnCGNL4LLY3zNcGBfwfMv9fDXlyjwgMFE7f43Jg4QMJNJnLTBo-Thg7bLPcNyMeRxYJWWwEEO9EkJi5k9XPy0h7MG_97eo-yaXEiaNK8mbinb2-q6prKPfJnSBAUzrScWbS6mtrvH9HMuem-8oUalmtE62nFAEN8S1urEsDpjBNKndC-MpkP4C2G8JDx4eDKhyUB6C8jMzxNz950BcqSbHuN-XlxJ5qyJsKPEnylCZodpiiFMk3CBw9uki2PwUOFNA0KQedc056r6eDtkMOeUXqt_hHIoedmY9vf3EU%3D)**

clean_body: I defeated the Democrat incumbent to become the first Republican to hold this Senate seat in my lifetime. | Peter, My name is Kevin Cramer. I am an America First Republican and conservative warrior who flipped a critical Senate seat from the Democrats in 2018 -becoming the first Republican to hold this North Dakota seat in my lifetime. The Democrats will stop at nothing to force their socialist agenda on America and try to unseat any steadfast conservative who stands in their way. And since I took this seat from the radical Left... I am the Democrats’ TOP TARGET in 2024. This pivotal 2024 Election for control of the U.S. Senate is about a future that preserves our American traditions of freedom and prosperity and honors our history and our North Dakota way of life. For me, that life began in Rolla and then on to Kindred, North Dakota, where I was raised and started my education, which I continued at Concordia College in Minnesota and the University of Mary in Bismarck, where my family and I now call home. I began serving North Dakota, working my way up to becoming a North Dakota Public Service Commissioner, helping oversee the most dynamic energy industry in the nation , leading with free market and limited government principles and commonsense energy policies that benefit our people, and ensure our energy independence. In 2012, I was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives, where I stood up for the right to life, energy independence, the Second Amendment, commonsense healthcare, and federal assistance reform. I vigorously supported President Donald J. Trump’s America First agenda. In 2018, I defeated Democrat incumbent Heidi Heitkamp to become the first North Dakota Republican to hold my seat in my lifetime \-- and continued fighting for our conservative principles -- first in support of President Trump and, after 2020, to resist the Biden Democrats’ disastrous agenda of spending, taxes, inflation, failure to protect our border and chaos overseas. And that brings us to today -- the start of the 2024 Senate election cycle-- and our incredible opportunity to win a new GOP Majority in the U.S. Senate that will bring the leftist Democrats’ destructive schemes to a screeching halt. Peter, I’m doing everything I can to support the election of common sense conservatives in key U.S. Senate races across the country who will honor our past as we work to save the future -- The Democrats are gearing up to go on the offense, and they have their sights set on my seat, and we cannot afford to give up a single seat to the radical left. that will help me secure a victory in this critical U.S. Senate Election we can defeat the Democrats and demand policies that serve the best interests of our people \-- and ensure that liberty and the American Dream don’t disappear. Thank you \-- Sincerely, Kevin Cramer | | Paid for by Cramer for Senate Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Team Cori
subject: Missouri failed Raheem
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Content Warning: Prison, capital punishment
#
Peter,
While the media has spent the past week focusing on President Biden’s State of the Union and the Super Bowl, Team Cori has been mourning the killing of Leonard “Raheem” Taylor by the State of Missouri.
Despite significant evidence that showed Raheem was innocent — and Cori demanding the halting of the execution — the state officials of Missouri denied him any shred of human dignity and decency. Our criminal-legal system should never take a life.
**The death penalty is always cruel and never just. It’s long past time we abolish it, once and for all.[Sign your name today and join Cori in calling for the abolition of the death penalty immediately.](https://act.coribush.org/sign/abolish-death-penalty/?source=em20230213-2170&t=1&akid=2170%2E1082990%2EcZmz7Z)**
Our country has no place for the racist and immoral death penalty. Cori understands that abolishing the death penalty is a critical step towards transforming our unjust criminal-legal system — that’s why she has made it a key priority in her legislative work.
Cori has been hard at work building momentum to abolish the death penalty and to transform public safety systems in our communities so we can finally end the cycle of state-sanctioned violence that too often kills Black and brown people.
**[Please add your name to the growing list of people who support the abolition of the death penalty](https://act.coribush.org/sign/abolish-death-penalty/?source=em20230213-2170&t=2&akid=2170%2E1082990%2EcZmz7Z) **
**[Sign the petition»](https://act.coribush.org/sign/abolish-death-penalty/?source=em20230213-2170&t=3&akid=2170%2E1082990%2EcZmz7Z)**
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230213?refcode=em20230213-2170-footer&t=4&refcode2=2170_1082990_cZmz7Z&akid=2170%2E1082990%2EcZmz7Z) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=5&akid=2170%2E1082990%2EcZmz7Z)

After several years away in Florida, due to tyrannical COVID lockdowns from DC’s liberal overlords, CPAC is excited to come back to our nation’s capital at the Gaylord at National Harbor.
**_And just like in years past, we have a great lineup of exciting speakers that will demonstrate Conservative and Republican values that you do not want to miss._**

This is going to make the socialist left crazy. We will lay out our plan to take on Joe Biden, his corrupt cronies and all the fake news media who are turning our great nation upside down.

DO NOT miss your chance to meet conservatives from across the country and to hear from our incredible lineup. We promise that you will regret not seeing speakers like...
* President Donald J. Trump
* Senator Ted Cruz
* Former U.S Secretary of State Mike Pompeo
* Steve Bannon
* And many more surprise guests you’ll have to see for yourself!

| | | [JOIN US IN DC](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw9kE9vhCAQxT-N3tbgwIo9eNjuv7Rp09NuejMIo5KKWsQav33BbJuQSfjNvMfwsEgznlEKTyyNVcFApLWMdQEEKIGUERJqwjlTyNIKaS3EU4oRI2iE7pLaIrpW919olb-viRxM3BZVmgMwwXNkjOeypoJUtIK8FoTuKcnjrmidG6eIHiK4-LMsS4I_2LspkaOQyWCb0KCX2ZlSCjMK3fQRPQ2mKtXQl4Mpa6fKrt-F8RJN-diYRpAFzTTMVuKmeBCDSs_GE_wjcuidf9KjYJI-qEMbpry9B2XfaRU0ip4vx2-H-QZbrfzup88P8fJmX6-xLdS46K7TU8Z9Ns2WTYjCb97pei0i_hwBbDKA7dcwO3oXt9u7XXf7w3l33d-hCU04-urWEf8nHybJFnmg_PQLKpOJMw)

We hope to see you on March 1-4 in our nation’s capital. It will be epic and we are ready to save America together!

Yours in Freedom,

Matt Schlapp
Chairman, CPAC

subject: NOW LAUNCHING: Activate your EMILYs List membership today >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | I wanted to reach out personally about how important this opportunity is [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58685530/391887565/-1260642841?sourceid=1048613&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIxZWU4MS1mYWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfSxJsuvDR-etgfl8khBmCdy-yw0XRz_rhsIuwF9z2U=&emci=f40e5f07-cfab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b221ee81-faab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) We're running a _four-day_ February membership drive to grow the team that can recruit, train, and elect powerful Democratic pro-choice women in 2023 and beyond. **Donate before midnight to become an *official* card-carrying EMILYs List member:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58685531/391887566/-1260642841?sourceid=1048613&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIxZWU4MS1mYWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfSxJsuvDR-etgfl8khBmCdy-yw0XRz_rhsIuwF9z2U=&emci=f40e5f07-cfab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b221ee81-faab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

I wanted to reach out to you personally on the first day of our February EMILYs List 2023 membership drive.

It's no secret that the 2023-24 cycle will be a tough fight. Protecting our razor-thin majority in the Senate, flipping the House, and keeping anti-choice Republicans out of positions of power — we have our work cut out for us.

As the president of EMILYs List, I've witnessed just how game-changing early investment in campaigns can be. Our success in the 2022 midterms was made possible by the EMILYs List members who pledged their commitment to support the scores of incredible Democratic pro-choice women who defied the odds and beat back the predicted red wave.

**[We're looking to register 25,000 EMILYs List members for 2023 over the next four days, and I want your name on our roster, Peter. Donate on the *first day* of our February membership drive to become a part of the team that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women from coast to coast.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58685555/391887619/-1260642841?sourceid=1048613&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIxZWU4MS1mYWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfSxJsuvDR-etgfl8khBmCdy-yw0XRz_rhsIuwF9z2U=&emci=f40e5f07-cfab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b221ee81-faab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** As you know, there's truly no "off year" in a political landscape marred by our post-_Roe v. Wade_ reality. While we're just over a month and a half into the new year, our campaigns teams are working hard, hand-selecting our next slate of inspiring pro-choice candidates to defeat Republican extremism at every opportunity.

That's why these membership drives are so critical, Peter. The earlier we can begin to pool our resources so that we can uplift and support races (_happening as soon as this month!_), the better chance we have at protecting choice for millions, defending our democracy, and shattering any barriers that stand in our way**.**

EMILYs List members not only invest in the fight to protect reproductive rights, but they help to elect Democratic pro-choice women to offices where these decisions are _made_. From city hall to the halls of Congress, EMILYs List is changing the face of politics, and we want _**you**_ on the team.

**So I want to personally invite you to join us by donating on launch day to become a 2023 member and be a part of this groundbreaking, history making pro-choice community:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Activate-Your-2023-Membership](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58685556/391887620/-1260642841?sourceid=1048613&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjIxZWU4MS1mYWFiLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CfSxJsuvDR-etgfl8khBmCdy-yw0XRz_rhsIuwF9z2U=&emci=f40e5f07-cfab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=b221ee81-faab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

clean_body: | | | I wanted to reach out personally about how important this opportunity is We're running a four-day February membership drive to grow the team that can recruit, train, and elect powerful Democratic pro-choice women in 2023 and beyond. Donate before midnight to become an official card-carrying EMILYs List member: Peter, I wanted to reach out to you personally on the first day of our February EMILYs List 2023 membership drive. It's no secret that the 2023-24 cycle will be a tough fight. Protecting our razor-thin majority in the Senate, flipping the House, and keeping anti-choice Republicans out of positions of power — we have our work cut out for us. As the president of EMILYs List, I've witnessed just how game-changing early investment in campaigns can be. Our success in the 2022 midterms was made possible by the EMILYs List members who pledged their commitment to support the scores of incredible Democratic pro-choice women who defied the odds and beat back the predicted red wave. As you know, there's truly no "off year" in a political landscape marred by our post-Roe v. Wade reality. While we're just over a month and a half into the new year, our campaigns teams are working hard, hand-selecting our next slate of inspiring pro-choice candidates to defeat Republican extremism at every opportunity. That's why these membership drives are so critical, Peter. The earlier we can begin to pool our resources so that we can uplift and support races (happening as soon as this month!), the better chance we have at protecting choice for millions, defending our democracy, and shattering any barriers that stand in our way. EMILYs List members not only invest in the fight to protect reproductive rights, but they help to elect Democratic pro-choice women to offices where these decisions are made. From city hall to the halls of Congress, EMILYs List is changing the face of politics, and we want you on the team. So I want to personally invite you to join us by donating on launch day to become a 2023 member and be a part of this groundbreaking, history making pro-choice community: Thank you, Laphonza Butler President, EMILYs List | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
How cool is the thought that thousands of people across the country are coming together to act in support of our shared goal?
#

Peter -
The sky is not falling.
All hope is not lost.
Our fundraising has slowed down, but since this morning we’ve had a lot of people chip in to help us close the gap.
Now they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Please use this link:
[**Can Ruben count on you to contribute $3 to his campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230213-2-7&t=1&akid=391%2E734936%2EQa9uy7)

How cool is the thought that thousands of people across the country are coming together to act in support of our shared goal.

**But she isn’t giving up.** Justice Sotomayor says she'll keep fighting for us every single day, and we MUST follow her example!

We’ve launched an URGENT petition to show that Democrats won’t back down. We’ll ALWAYS fight for reproductive freedoms. And with Republicans doing everything they can to take away our rights, _now is the time to step up._ **Let's stand with Justice Sotomayor TODAY:**

**[Sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition to show that you stand for reproductive freedoms at this critical moment in American history >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230213-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230213-SupremeCourtUpdate-SotomayorQuoteReboot-Pros-sl1&akid=9814%2E9716520%2EUKwDLM)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?LucasKunce.com?=
subject: Lucas has some exciting personal news…
body:
#
Hey Peter, we have some exciting news to share... **Lucas got married!**
[](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=96d912efd7&e=8095450ef8)
Last month, Lucas Kunce married his wife Marilyn at the Jackson County Courthouse in Independence -- and they're expecting a baby later this year!
**Our whole team couldn 't be happier for Lucas and Marilyn, so we wanted to give top supporters like you an opportunity to personally congratulate and wish them well. [So will you take just a moment to sign their wedding card? Feel free to add a note too, and we'll deliver it to them on Friday!](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=87b8aeded7&e=8095450ef8)**
**[Sign the card](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=df660737a9&e=8095450ef8)**
---
-- Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=eedd6eab86&e=8095450ef8)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://middleseat.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4df735ad160f8636f8fa36143&id=10a32a162c&e=8095450ef8&c=af879852e0). Mail us: PO BOX 1240, Independence, MO 64050.

subject: Women!!!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58686755/391914802/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230213_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0ZDk1ZmQtMDRhYy1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xl1HwPq5M3uB2_9rs15GcDMKj0uNffzi2xxgqZYHZFQ=)

There is nothing in this world as powerful as women supporting other women. I get emotional thinking about all the women in my life — my mom, my sister, my friends, my family, my former colleagues in the House — and how determined they are to make life better for all those around them. But our country will only see systemic policy changes that support women when we start electing badass, progressive women to all the chambers where decisions are made. We need women EVERYWHERE: advocating for us, amplifying our voices, supporting our needs. That’s what Galentine’s Day is really about. [_**So pitch in today to help us elect women at ALL levels of government, ALL across the country — exactly where women belong.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58686756/391914810/-1909562274?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230213_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0ZDk1ZmQtMDRhYy1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xl1HwPq5M3uB2_9rs15GcDMKj0uNffzi2xxgqZYHZFQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58686760/391914815/-1909562274?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230213_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzk0ZDk1ZmQtMDRhYy1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xl1HwPq5M3uB2_9rs15GcDMKj0uNffzi2xxgqZYHZFQ=)

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: You won't want to miss this one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| Friend -- I want to take some time this week to look ahead with you toward the big picture for the future of our country. The antidote to the poisonous politics enveloping our nation and making it impossible to solve problems is the _Reasonable Majority_. Country First has a plan to awaken and activate even more of them. I'll be previewing the launch of our brand new national campaign, short film, and strategic theme: BREAK FREE. You will not want to miss this. [**RSVP: #BREAKFREE CAMPFIRE**](https://www.country1st.com/r?u=RDcZDUOB5xo0RLGZuMRMKpclGpe6494pwB_MpR59LOCrEJZkbkKP-AdXcGqG1UgilDBNeJmgVgW8Q-BQwSRUhg&e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bf_campfire_nd&n=1) I really hope you can make it on **Thursday, February 16th** at:
* 8:00 pm Eastern
* 7:00 pm Central
* 6:00 pm Mountain
* 5:00 pm Pacific
* 4:00 pm Alaska
* 3:00 pm Hawaii

These illuminating and hopeful gatherings are always very popular, so we hope you'll invite as many of your likeminded family and friends as possible to join us, even if they aren't members of Country First. Aim to bring at least two more people with you (we call it **YOU+2**), which may mean inviting several more than that. The webinar will be immediately followed by breakout sessions where we can thoughtfully discuss these issues with other good folks from around the country. We want to hear what _you_ think.**** I know it's just a couple days notice, but I hope you can make it! Country First, Adam [**> > Support the Mission**](https://www.country1st.com/donate?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bf_campfire_nd&n=2) [**> > Wear the Cause**](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=bf_campfire_nd&n=3) | Paid for by Country First
---

I really hope you can make it on Thursday, February 16th at: 8:00 pm Eastern 7:00 pm Central 6:00 pm Mountain 5:00 pm Pacific 4:00 pm Alaska 3:00 pm Hawaii These illuminating and hopeful gatherings are always very popular, so we hope you'll invite as many of your likeminded family and friends as possible to join us, even if they aren't members of Country First. Aim to bring at least two more people with you (we call it YOU+2), which may mean inviting several more than that. The webinar will be immediately followed by breakout sessions where we can thoughtfully discuss these issues with other good folks from around the country. We want to hear what you think.**** I know it's just a couple days notice, but I hope you can make it! Country First, Adam | Paid for by Country First

name: Tom Brejcha
subject: Pro-life hero David Daleiden needs your help
body:
David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world.

David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world.

| |
---
| | Dear Friend,David Daleiden spent 30 months investigating and capturing video footage of Planned Parenthood executives haggling over the price of aborted baby body parts,exposing their evil to the world. _Now he’s being charged with 9 felonies for his heroism._[**Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztg18tblrrhq9ec30umpbsvj8d9hnrckhoinf6ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs) You might remember David Daleiden as the citizen journalist who recorded and released shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives back in 2015.But far from the abortion executives being held accountable for their crimes, _David_ is the one now facing nine bogus felonies and federal prison time. And it gets even worse, because after David released his appalling footage, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David...I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces years in a state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. All while Kamala Harris is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency.That's the bad news.But here's the good news... we’re still fighting for David.The Thomas More Society is a not-for-profit law firm spearheading and underwriting David’s criminal defense. **_Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back._** After significant delays, including multiple appeals to the California Supreme Court, David’s criminal trial will begin in just a few months. That trial, which itself could last up to two months, will be very costly. We’ve brought on board several legal all-stars to assist our Thomas More Society team in defending David. You see, we’ve retained the three-term former District Attorney of Los Angeles and several of his most skilled lieutenants. Bringing these experienced California criminal practitioners with our best attorneys means David will have the best criminal defense team possible to defend him in San Francisco, possibly the most hostile environment in the country for pro-lifers. [**Can I count on your emergency gift of $35 or more to the DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb18vqosnjm653grq58b4b28b6f0nnpdj585frpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs) The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini."You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment.And you couldn't be there with David when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal.But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do.[**You can make a donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvlqec85erg90j60abo26q3ns2vnfpj5um6lhps0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs) I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach.But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in pro-life courage.Now I'll get right down to it... In addition to this criminal case, and a federal civil rights countersuit, we're currently representing David in two other monster cases. Planned Parenthood sued David civilly in federal court in San Francisco. In that case, after a series of hostile rulings from an Obama-appointed district judge with ties to the local Planned Parenthood, we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with that judge's order banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The National Abortion Federation also sued David in the same court, in front of the same judge, for a "gag order" injunction that prohibits David from releasing blockbuster video from its two annual abortion industry conferences. David and his team collected hundreds of hours of videos of abortionists at their worst, but all of it remains under injunction. After a tough decision in front of a Ninth Circuit panel, **we’re now taking this all the way to the Supreme Court.** It's not all bad news though.Recently we scored a victory in a University of Washington (UW) case, where abortionists and their allies had sued David Daleiden and the UW over David’s public records requests for documents relating to the UW’s taxpayer-funded “clearinghouse” for aborted babies’ tissue and organs. **The Thomas More Society secured a settlement of this lawsuit** , clearing the way to end a six-year legal battle that included an astonishing three appeals to the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. That settlement won nearly everything that David Daleiden was seeking from the UW: **_thousands of pages of new documents on the buying and selling of aborted babies’ tissue and organs_** , including the key job titles and corporate information needed to track which companies and entities are buying and selling those baby parts, and for how much. Victories like this are why we continue to fight for David and the unborn, but the burden of these cases against David are heavy.That's why David needs your financial support today. [**And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z905irrccu61pdu2l5u4oq3n95q4r9s1qf82nrp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs) I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence.So, I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can.This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." **It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished**. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over **12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured.** Since that time, over half the states in the country have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding, and _Roe v. Wade_ has been overturned. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David.They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. [**So please don't delay. Donate $35, $50, $100, or more to stand with David Daleiden today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvrdonahttce5fj824p416m1r8lfg7d5pj53p328_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs) I know he'll be deeply touched by your generous support.
---
| | May God bless you,
---
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in a penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal, ghoulish activities. You and I cannot let that happen. Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of David Daleiden? [**David is a pro-life hero. Will you make a generous donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND of $35, $50, $100 or more to stop this attempt to crush him?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgto9pnrfq24td3nq2ih05n200i7ls6stp806fa8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs)
---
[**DONATE
**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7c8mvddhujv2dbigf6s591o04fe7sp90g6n8bv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs)
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z03s5uikasqiljkg4dsg7nbdi78ltn4fvfhksqv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs)
---
[_Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation._](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc0cl9frgpon9pbt1n6ch99lm7e9cvh642sn151g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs) © Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjkk2bp0ge46rdusi4n4lq7ca9l68n30dht6dg78_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 [privacy policy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk76hogfrruk8s2p1hlod3onq0qr6snikqqohieo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm4ob4c3h2bs)
---

---
|
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuhe07t82kahg0esu32v745smppl3k72kfm5n680_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlie3qood28p3e66qru2oa4ffh1apfq6l7uo601g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaa1o92narj0h9r4365f8ql105g2apmnkdotmlg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjfc8u0i36omrntudpi9dacnhefab5f5tr0ugcag_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5oobq26rsaq837iv08i5ku6fr8gu08ld63118a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeebsfccklleblc14g0jb99oo3h0gbtk5kjjuhko_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4us242b565k1pee6rdqlmd5um17ehrvqkeu1hio_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsk63c86br63k0m3sup49g1lu7occpa03072f29o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2g3uij8ibutm221k5kpq7qvta6b43j0ap798i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkdsog8s1b4epcp3tor33q7rkqp982s265h0jvpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zed5l5tkbeih00ojn1pqkurbm8o6ojkdeeknjcro_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq51jmid6sdca8e8tsi67jsmmvmaklj0llsrskig_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpjm6o30cjh2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2z2m9k4nnr4mk2nkj0gog3d1efvtmld5coerh0qgo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659832%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=58BD%2bBmv4bAeNuXhkcS8HA&sysid=1)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That’s why I hope you’ll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ONlvuMCLmiH71JSd3QRY8g&sysid=1)

Here’s how we’re reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT’s Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT’s five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America’s minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659834%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bI60OH3IZJrjZXlNRfYcug&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c659846%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7XYWhVyCa7qkowJiaFaVyQ&sysid=1)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: It's Really DARK Out There...
body:
The ONLY Hope For America Is... It is really dark right now in America. The performance of Sam Smith worshipping the devil at the Grammy's on Nation
| | |
---
## The ONLY Hope For America Is...
---
It is _really dark_ right now in America. The performance of **Sam Smith** worshipping the devil at the Grammy's on National Television is an indication of the spiritual sickness in America. Not only has Satan worship become mainstream, but **gender confusion** is spreading like the way we were told **COVID19** was supposed to but never actually did. **Children are being mutilated across the nation**. It once was a crime to mutilate a child but now it is a celebration. Sunday, I preached a sermon at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10524.1.52b2fa06c058b8717504392a52e94fff) entitled: [It's Dark Out There](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10525.1.3e120ddfa01853d7db57250ab5ee6dc7).
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10526.1.407678465785103a334833733bd089ba)
---
In this message, I address the **darkness** (the problem) but also where the **light** is supposed to come from (the solution).
**The ONLY hope of America is Jesus through the Church.**
Unfortunately, most Christians struggle defining what the Church is.
I break down the meaning of the Church and what it is truly meant to be.
Check this message out: [https://youtu.be/xbQA3zEUmnY](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10527.1.2a9d51400e8de58f47b6d0bf48355bcc)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10528.1.6c3cb98d98b2d23e7a8ec5a8f82968cd), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10529.1.e75484b9dc32d45a5ee53d50770f56eb), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10530.1.9ac2ab8f05f89b220d97cc6af170a06d), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10531.1.cfb1bed94bf0484af4f2583315ecc102), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10532.1.9683e29ee9c2c5ea2033e4a9aff33cc4), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10533.1.ec305fe380027d40fafe175b908802b7)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10534.1.167e3c63f456fe6dcf72b1afb75acb45)
| | [ Watch: It's Dark Out There ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10535.1.ad9770ed7038d010cd58f66e249e8a2b)
---
---
## Who Is The Antichrist?
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10536.1.e103beaf838b07790d7dcf0d1f8e58f9)
---
There is a TON of speculation about who the **Antichrist** is...
**Joe Biden**? **Hillary Clinton**? **Donald Trump**? **Pope Francis**? and on and on.
Right now, at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10537.1.379a814816d28e537165494295652c29) for our midweek service, I am doing a series over the [Book of Revelation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10538.1.ca7fe90f6d7419582a4ee8553edd565f) (_line by line and verse by verse_).
Last night, our study took us to **Revelation 13** which is all about the **Antichrist** , the **False Prophet** and the **Mark of the Beast**.
Here is a link to my perspective of what Scripture says regarding the Antichrist, False Prophet & Mark of the Beast: [www.youtube.com/live/LBy2Ix5PFc8?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10539.1.94caaeb3659c2d5e9641cc082838a614)
You can also watch the FULL SERIES over Revelation at: [https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ0-pMl6zciQZxE5DSzcAKwH3M3DNQecu](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10540.1.a0c9fd5d18db3b0b11b6a17e278441c3)
| | [ Support Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10541.1.179b113cf64ccf4ad6f5a9fa3aeac6f6)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10542.1.fd7ef9a51f7aed6b47ee8546111a8b8f)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10543.1.18aea78348d2247bd116075405930453), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10544.1.99ef58a4f76ce1892de5fab5614de6d2).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10545.1.e6f47f093b00c993d3524f7d0ed752ea) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 66% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10546.1.ff84775afa6b2f6e8e2b39d5c5f5fd75)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18098521.10547.1.71ea65130ab7ca3168fc62972ed0d3a8) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...

name: Alan Keck
subject: The border crisis you won’t hear about.
body:
Kentucky’s workforce crisis.
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-r/) Good governance isn't glamorous. While you'll hear a whole lot about the U.S. southern border crisis from candidates in this race, _you won 't find another talking about a different border crisis right here at home, hitting business owners in the pocketbook in a very real way-**Kentucky 's workforce crisis.**_ [__**Watch my latest Kentucky Talks interview, where I sit down with Joey Traughber of Simpson County 's own Traughber Mechanical, to discuss how the workforce crisis is affecting Kentucky's frontier communities.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-j/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-t/) On all sides, Kentucky is bordered by states with lower income taxes-_**or no income tax at all**_ -like Tennessee. With inflation, rising gas and grocery prices already hitting Kentuckians hard, _it should be no surprise that thousands of Kentuckians work just a few short miles over the state line to save a few bucks at home.__Kentucky businesses, small, medium and large alike, just can 't compete in a Commonwealth hosting the region's highest state income taxes-**that 's why I want to see them eliminated faster!**_ We've gotta start winning again, and abolishing the income tax is the clearest cut way of how we do. [__**Do you agree? Then I need you on Team Keck!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-i/) My sitdown with Traughber Mechanical is just the latest of my Kentucky Talks series where I talk with Kentuckians about the critical Kentucky crises _you just won 't hear from anyone else._ [__**Check out the full playlist of interviews here!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-d/) Our Commonwealth faces complex challenges that require a CEO with public-and-private sector experience to solve them. _**Not just another politician.**_ As your Governor, I'll deliver for Kentucky _as I 've delivered for Somerset_-having revitalized our downtown, supported and continuing to support our small businesses, and treated our taxpayer's dollars with respect.That's what the Commonwealth demands, and that's what the Commonwealth deserves-[__**but we can 't deliver that without your help.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-h/)If you've gotten this far, [__**would you consider donating just a smidge of your time, talent or treasure to our campaign?**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-k/) We've come so far in a few short months, but we have a long way to go before the primary. [__**I can 't do this alone, and your support can make the difference.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-u/)[__**So, I hope you 'll join me if you haven't already**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-o/), because...it's time to make Kentucky win again.Thank you, and God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-b/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-n/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-nutitik-dytiuyidkd-p/)
---

name: Matt's iPhone
subject: Let’s fend off the Swamp tonight
body:
| | |
---
| Hey Peter,
---
| Thought I'd use this spare minute in the Swamp to reach out personally...
Ever since I triggered the Establishment by demanding MORE from our House Majority, it's become clear that we can't afford to take any days off.
Why?
Because the Swamp is mad that we just restored accountability to the House.

* They're mad that we challenged the status quo.

* They're mad that we're investigating the Deep State and the weaponization of our government.

* They're mad that we're committed to cutting off the multi-billion dollar Ukraine gravy train.

Because of all of this, Peter, the target that was ALREADY on my back just got that much bigger...
[And I need the reinforcements to stand strong.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UP4ChjxrgtZ76I0mwqWAQMrl5pb7tU8D6dj7Nv4ltewYHdGonpl2BGD7UW592YdBL7wfj5s3rb1k0qb3eLmfB14DQWbMeXsXlCGsqx7abj-gmdmbNFdAV9CAuOAcuanTzAyIHYRfjyOTPUMAlNQS8cZwVupMwkfH3S13UISGY2xCDhOL8y5fmcnu_E6u_zlR9sC-7nmOrMrDIqIwWQv77A==&c=FiiSQmDq5keRyFVX2hS1KaTpe9zi7L0VgrePxOWD9NjXZkwayxPiKA==&ch=2PTcxVxr147wlWUlMwU89yoJum8vK1-Y5JaXSwNC8a_jcs18zVEepA==)
My goal for the mid-month deadline tonight is to raise an additional $2,100 in grassroots donations before midnight so that I'm ready for ANY attack they throw my way.

clean_body: | | | | Hey Peter, | Thought I'd use this spare minute in the Swamp to reach out personally... Ever since I triggered the Establishment by demanding MORE from our House Majority, it's become clear that we can't afford to take any days off. Why? Because the Swamp is mad that we just restored accountability to the House. They're mad that we challenged the status quo. They're mad that we're investigating the Deep State and the weaponization of our government. * They're mad that we're committed to cutting off the multi-billion dollar Ukraine gravy train. Because of all of this, Peter, the target that was ALREADY on my back just got that much bigger... == My goal for the mid-month deadline tonight is to raise an additional $2,100 in grassroots donations before midnight so that I'm ready for ANY attack they throw my way. Will you help me make sure they don't take away everything we worked so hard for by clicking this link and defending our VICTORIES? -> == | Thanks for keeping up the fight, | -MG Sent from my iPhone. | | | | | Copyright (C) 2022 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Senator Art Haywood Endorses Dr. Nina Ahmad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for Philly
body:
I am honored to receive the endorsement from Senator Art Haywood of the 4th Senatorial District.

"I am proud to endorse Dr. Nina Ahmad as Philadelphia City Council at Large. I have known and respected Nina for many years. Nina is hard-working, exceptionally intelligent and a creative, purposeful leader. As someone who cares deeply about economic opportunity, I am struck by Nina's forward-looking insights about the power of science & data to advance socially responsible indices and analytics so programs having real effect are supported and funded to scale."
To have the support of one of the most empathetic and solution-oriented legislators in Pennsylvania is very meaningful. Senator Haywood has reduced homelessness through expansion of the Pennsylvania Housing Affordability and Rehabilitation Enhancement Act, passed requirements to test for lead in water in Pennsylvania schools, and successfully championed legislation to relocate domestic violence survivors living in public housing.
I look forward to collaborating with him if you help me win an at-Large seat on Philadelphia City Council.
You can help our campaign to continue messaging to voters by making a contribution Here. The stakes are too high for any of us to sit on the sidelines.
**[Can you please help me today with $5, $10, $20.20 or $100? Can I count on you to help get my message to all of Philadelphia?](https://act.myngp.com/el/_4subLtz3pwEPyZhLljVimhj4RLSAFhtz7b2zcz6WIw=/UaCLMWXSAwdXip1gb6O2zMwUcdVvPui1ALahWR_SL2I=)**
Thank you for your vote and your support
Humbly Yours,
Nina

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/_4subLtz3pwEPyZhLljVimhj4RLSAFhtz7b2zcz6WIw=/Bzcl4FTcNw-8TyXgOgbKaUdsoqFevYh2vTBddf-tyjU=)
[Join Team Nina ](https://act.myngp.com/el/_4subLtz3pwEPyZhLljVimhj4RLSAFhtz7b2zcz6WIw=/c9yZWmbkxoegFhY8nalyvI4NkxJVflQ0usY5CdcR3yM=)

For more information about Nina's campaign, Please visit: [www.Ninaforphilly.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/_4subLtz3pwEPyZhLljVimhj4RLSAFhtz7b2zcz6WIw=/c9yZWmbkxoegFhY8nalyvI4NkxJVflQ0usY5CdcR3yM=)

Ron Johnson

subject: let me explain

---
I'm about to ask you to donate $5, friend. **But first, please let me explain why your $5 today will make such a big difference in the fight to defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**
Experts at The Washington Post are calling the 2024 Senate map "a GOP dream." And after Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York last year to retake the House majority, they're now targeting me as a key pickup opportunity in their fight to flip the Senate, too.
We simply can't let that happen — not when everything from Social Security to reproductive freedom to the future of the Supreme Court are at stake. But while Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies gear up to spend _hundreds of millions of dollars_ to retake power, I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs.
**That's why I'm relying entirely on grassroots supporters like you to step up ahead of tomorrow's critical mid-month deadline to help us reach our $25,000 goal — one $5 donation at a time. Falling short would send a clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs, so I'm counting on your urgent help, friend.**
**[Please, will you chip in $5 right now so we can reach our critical mid-month goal, defeat the GOP here in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats? name: ConservativeFWDCandace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zu1skl7ahtn6dih0q3ku9lj25jsq7ahu65keccvo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65slnmpjm2or4e5i6dcjgehpr8t3gmhrrattlc2qracpge5ge0tdl6ho6eork6erjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p7cphgesqjcdtim5j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash1k8gn48n24hhmeor6c3j64p33c8iv0)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbct72hc69iedgfc1dcck5dbt8mpo24l7decs8qo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zv519nj5t64dlt7rd49mntkegikvr65i0co02r0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z25dorcrbl3t23v0ur3gq7v7otj6cumhiqcrbtbo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zakhjaml4n0j02ovlr8smh6685vr88sl5ceak368_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z8po0kigmi6sog4ajvk1sdd2v1v1v76qgbirm2f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z7c0mang1qgehr3aokra8pkkajai6dece34vk0eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zqbjmvmmu6as4cce409g756o0td1ngfqcn67kq78_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrso033cdulo0sbvt6nsosfs7q7guu4so9oae5fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zoqilimtdc05gvds8j379cgk5aocackdtdq6t918_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgb8sl9gk4eu5cap17b82a45vog5jrvj2cibgvgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zdmnkkqis6p7gqog1ed04e375gha7716hs86vlkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0setslnrkkald3tgig83dn6q869n3n11jcpb120_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpgecoj4cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President

Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States. . . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University. That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history: BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development. The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips. And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality. 1. Advocating for School Choice. 2. Promoting criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities. 3. Championing entrepreneurship and free enterprise. 4. Developing history programs that will inspire minority children. Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences. BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities. Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? Click below to send your support. Thank you, Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law. 15 E Market St #6103 Leesburg, VA 20178 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Conservative FWD, . 625 First Street #183 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Bo Snerdley
subject: Let’s tell the Truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
That's why we need to use this opportunity to share the truth with Black America!

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62320534:6zOPYiG4N:m:1:3331421248:3C8D63AE9EB69675A7A9985BF9A28FE7:r "Black History Month") Peter: I recently toured a prestigious school and noticed a huge bulletin board in the lobby celebrating Black History Month with pictures of Black leaders, past and present. Unfortunately, I also noticed that it lacked any reference to conservative Black Republicans who've shaped our nation's history like:
* Justice Clarence Thomas
* Thomas Sowell, or
* the late, great Dr. Walter Williams.

It only had names like John Lewis and Shirly Chisolm. How is that for being "inclusive?" **Black History Month is the perfect time to remind people how one political party has profited from keeping Black people down while the other has sought to help us live the American Dream.** How the Democrat Party's economic policies are causing most Americans to struggle. How their anti-cop and anti-gun rights policies are making our communities less safe. How their woke education policies and desire to have transgender boys playing on girls' teams will prevent our children from earning scholarships, succeeding in their chosen professions and are more likely to keep them from becoming a productive member of our society. **[The tide is turning, but we can't break through the bias without sharing our message. Will you join our efforts too with your generous financial contribution and help us share the truth?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62320534:6zOPYiG4N:m:1:3331421248:3C8D63AE9EB69675A7A9985BF9A28FE7:r "The
tide is turning, but we can’t break through the bias without sharing our message. Will you join our efforts to with your generous financial
contribution and help us share the truth?")** Democrats will try to convince us that they want to help Black America get ahead. These are the same people whose priorities have been forcing mandates upon us, giving taxpayer funded benefits to illegal border crossers and spend more time trying to control us rather than lift us up. **That 's why we need to use this opportunity to share the truth with Black America!** It's time to recover our history, revive our dream, and rewrite the destiny of all Black Americans. **[That can only happen if you make an URGENT contribution TODAY and help us show Black Americans the REAL Black History!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62320534:6zOPYiG4N:m:1:3331421248:3C8D63AE9EB69675A7A9985BF9A28FE7:r "That can only happen if you make an URGENT contribution TODAY and
help us show Black Americans the REAL Black History!")** Let's make sure Black America knows:
* Why the GOP is the Party of Lincoln.
* How Joe Biden championed legislation as a Senator to punish young, black men while calling us "super predators."
* That it was Donald Trump who most recently signed criminal justice reform into law.
* It was Ron DeSantis who empowered parents to control the education being taught to their children over the objections of school boards.
* At the same time, Democrats sided with the teacher's unions who demanded the parents be treated like "domestic terrorists."

Most importantly, let's use this Black History Month to remind Black America how the left chose to become our woke masters and perpetuate segregation instead of delivering on their promises to lift up Black America. **[Help us share this message with your support TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62320534:6zOPYiG4N:m:1:3331421248:3C8D63AE9EB69675A7A9985BF9A28FE7:r "Help us share this message with your support TODAY!")** Black Communities need to hear this message before leftwing billionaires start pouring their money into these areas again to influence the 2024 Election or else GOP efforts seeking to expand the success we had in the last two elections will be handicapped. **Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it.** So help us ensure Black America learns the truth and joins the Party of Lincoln. **[Donate Today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62320534:6zOPYiG4N:m:1:3331421248:3C8D63AE9EB69675A7A9985BF9A28FE7:r "Donate Today.")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62320534:6zOPYiG4N:m:1:3331421248:3C8D63AE9EB69675A7A9985BF9A28FE7:r "James
Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley") James Golden, aka Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
