body:
Black history is under attack.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58705753/391972114/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230214DefendBH_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI1MjY4OS03ZWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YBsporoqYhvVRO0w3tBfdLTqKsjRicHqRmui_tTLHw=) **URGENT ACTION:** Ohio and Republican-held state legislatures across the country are stripping Black history from our schools and silencing the Black voices that helped build the America we know today. [**_Fight back to protect Black voices and show the GOP that Black history is American history by signing our petition now._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58705754/391972115/-685213881?refcode=EM_PET_230214DefendBH_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI1MjY4OS03ZWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YBsporoqYhvVRO0w3tBfdLTqKsjRicHqRmui_tTLHw=&emci=59b52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58705755/391972116/-685213881?refcode=EM_PET_230214DefendBH_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI1MjY4OS03ZWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YBsporoqYhvVRO0w3tBfdLTqKsjRicHqRmui_tTLHw=&emci=59b52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811)
* * *
Peter,

Ohio is leading a dangerous charge to erase Black history from our schools and silencing Black voices.

Just two years ago, the Ohio GOP banned teaching Black history in schools, replacing an anti-racism resolution with a ban on “divisive” topics. Now, they’re trying to strip the Board of Education of its power by vesting it in an appointed figure, giving our Republican governor control of the curriculum. This is unacceptable, Peter, and it’s time to take action.

[**_This Black History Month is a call to action to defend our history and uplift Black voices. Will you join Shontel Brown in fighting back against extreme politicians who want to erase Black history and silence our voices by signing our petition today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58705756/391972117/-685213881?refcode=EM_PET_230214DefendBH_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI1MjY4OS03ZWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YBsporoqYhvVRO0w3tBfdLTqKsjRicHqRmui_tTLHw=&emci=59b52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58705757/391972118/-685213881?refcode=EM_PET_230214DefendBH_N_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_TESTB_b2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI1MjY4OS03ZWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2YBsporoqYhvVRO0w3tBfdLTqKsjRicHqRmui_tTLHw=&emci=59b52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb52689-7eac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Black history is American history, and it's time for us to stand up and defend it.

We’re in this together,

Team Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d823673ac7b1446a91eed97762f51727&_e=V1VZ2SEl-Wpsb6Q7aImmcsf6OK4pNdIyEKObJFsjN9g40uShmxIUa0i9YJLECypDUpsMl3so9Pip5NfY6wEK8o20E2mEW4EAapniHW9p77pi_W9R7QwiJ5g9rvMWJFpGRD7yhCdfS_F72Rfz7K-iH1E3cnjFacxsv2pCml_kU_fIz2T_rWH96OYDDQ5WtFIxR5IyV0GJnjoFJR218rdyxrYP6q8TE4xabDfeGW5O42PonnhJp21H2eI8Ad21Rkekglk9ErHB0rEdwZktw-mQjq-0hy-ZPsbPXrtRI97KkrE%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d823673ac7b1446a91eed97762f51727&_e=V1VZ2SEl-Wpsb6Q7aImmcsf6OK4pNdIyEKObJFsjN9g40uShmxIUa0i9YJLECypDUpsMl3so9Pip5NfY6wEK8o20E2mEW4EAapniHW9p77pi_W9R7QwiJ5g9rvMWJFpGRD7yhCdfS_F72Rfz7K-iH-Z33-a33aZdgl6un_eqholVTmPL5duQO-2EPjepk2-rcCHLAORX6A_5pkzRTZ7CY6DnR2SV9IeyzoXwS_z-nsXZCmGh_oQepER2PZqD4hUTNGSW2wzSAlI-z_cjLIm8eiaXpsaYka6wRKrwFY0BsTU%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d823673ac7b1446a91eed97762f51727&_e=V1VZ2SEl-Wpsb6Q7aImmcsf6OK4pNdIyEKObJFsjN9g40uShmxIUa0i9YJLECypDUpsMl3so9Pip5NfY6wEK8o20E2mEW4EAapniHW9p77pi_W9R7QwiJ5g9rvMWJFpGRD7yhCdfS_F72Rfz7K-iH4QthamaO_xEZytKzrm9YTtpvNE6zDCz5ITdcrBV3zP7Kaep2v-Kg5FspCYC-8rCj0pciIXd51swN-7Lk7bPF5_ox6GXlzPC8O41fAQdaLelJrhE7wim8_7O5GKfOwJ5EYepEQQ19Kw7vTsRLxbr74E%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zk6o2s1056jvt7ock46tosa7eq3vq26flbbi4jt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbcve8d51b3ldpg8qjnqqdaoju3v2pdk2mgbhuao_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0tva8r1uf2eoolr0ogeam2hiqdcvhn4gkht5j2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zak3f5dh1kfam1acuh4ap2jt4ucfq86tc5525n78_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpec264stlnmvv3jokoc5mij26dooqpndmfm4ano_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze9tgk208b1t47cqet43vmapbdl8lceb33l6i80o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2nkrqcraprt22jgracscf3al4m1g50ssabhei1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi7uc3tjkdj0okm5vcub8c3r93im2pfa9a5qpbsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsmgsnjgnkfh1c42kdtcupo01dd3au9vv7740qno_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2q8hah56faop86k52dq6hoc2kdlqpt13dlp6nng_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi6m3ibr2tj2n2f6sii3jgdkm6rkb69frskp93v8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie0o76c1h2bs)

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: "You don’t belong here"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
Friend,

I’m sure many of you have heard of George Santos, but if you haven’t, let me give you the truth behind one of the most outrageous new freshman Republicans. He’s fabricated virtually every aspect of his life. He lied about where he went to college. He lied about working at places that have no record of employing him. He even lied about tragedies in his family, from saying his mother was a victim of the September 11 attacks to claiming his grandparents were refugees who fled the Holocaust. There are many shameful characters in today’s GOP, but George Santos is one of the most disgraceful. It’s why I want to call attention to something Mitt Romney did on the night of the State of the Union. Romney is right—George Santos doesn’t belong in Congress.
##
Romney’s willingness to call out irresponsible voices in the GOP like George Santos shouldn’t be courageous. But when he and a select few others are the only ones willing to do it, we need to recognize it. It matters.
##
Today’s GOP has become dominated by embarrassments like George Santos and Marjorie Taylor Greene, and supposed grown-ups like Kevin McCarthy enable them. We need more Mitt Romneys in the party who still have the courage to call them out.
##
Mitt Romney shows that Republicans can still make the choice between being normal and being crazy. We’ll have his back, just like anyone else fighting for normalcy in the GOP.
##
Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: | Friend, I’m sure many of you have heard of George Santos, but if you haven’t, let me give you the truth behind one of the most outrageous new freshman Republicans. He’s fabricated virtually every aspect of his life. He lied about where he went to college. He lied about working at places that have no record of employing him. He even lied about tragedies in his family, from saying his mother was a victim of the September 11 attacks to claiming his grandparents were refugees who fled the Holocaust. There are many shameful characters in today’s GOP, but George Santos is one of the most disgraceful. It’s why I want to call attention to something Mitt Romney did on the night of the State of the Union. Romney is right—George Santos doesn’t belong in Congress. Romney’s willingness to call out irresponsible voices in the GOP like George Santos shouldn’t be courageous. But when he and a select few others are the only ones willing to do it, we need to recognize it. It matters. Today’s GOP has become dominated by embarrassments like George Santos and Marjorie Taylor Greene, and supposed grown-ups like Kevin McCarthy enable them. We need more Mitt Romneys in the party who still have the courage to call them out. Mitt Romney shows that Republicans can still make the choice between being normal and being crazy. We’ll have his back, just like anyone else fighting for normalcy in the GOP. Sarah Longwell President and Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Democrats used to be able to rely on Wisconsin being a Democratic-leaning swing state. No more. And their State Supreme Court has been part of this rightward slide. We have a rare opportunity right now to turn things around.
body:
Swing state to red state
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb9eb791-a44b-4c4d-b6a9-7a8c4524f4b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_In seven days Wisconsin could become a red state for the foreseeable future—a far cry from where it was when Democrats could often count on the state’s electoral votes for the presidency—OR ... we can help rebalance the state judiciary after years of Republican mismanagement._ ** _On February 21st, there's a first round of elections for an open Wisconsin Supreme Court seat_ _\--a top two primary for a seat vacated by a conservative judge_ _. If two Democrats win the primary, we can guarantee that the court adds another jurist who cares about democracy and women’s rights._ [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T93602c2b-4371-4e65-a446-8d82aca078a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _From our friends at Pod Save America:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c1451f4-a2ed-4a1f-9dfc-178232bf6f65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) To recap from a previous email we sent: **_With a right winger leaving Wisconsin's Supreme Court, we must elect a Democrat. There'__s an open primary Feb. 21st __with two Democrats and two Republicans_ _. If Dems run first and second, we guarantee a win in April's general election. At the very least, we must stop both Republicans from winning the 21st, shutting us out of the general election._** _Meanwhile, The Wisconsin Democratic Party just shared:_ We just got word MAGA Republican-aligned candidate Jennifer Dorow just placed a $60,000 ad buy.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3bc861ed-2d67-49be-b07d-6e378c96e9d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_A liberal Supreme Court majority will overturn Wisconsin's radical abortion ban and insane gerrymandering that delivered Kevin McCarthy a House majority. It'll President Biden in 2024 from what Republicans tried in '20 and promised to do again--use state legislatures and courts to steal the election._** [**_Can you join us in rushing $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice candidates _Everett Mitchell & Janet Protasiewicz. _It's hard to think of any race having more on the line._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00fa8b8f-cb94-42d0-b006-309bcfb1d930/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for democracy in Wisconsin and America! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41484ddf-872b-4c0d-b37c-7e11f2e013dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Don Huffines
subject: Economic pressure, courageous governor key to securing TX Border
body:
Illegal aliens are pouring across the Texas Border and invading our state. The federal government has abandoned its duty under the Constitution to protect Texas from invasion.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-fitwud-yuddtktydi-z/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **HLF: Economic pressure, courageous governor key to securing Texas Border**
Patriots,The federal government has abandoned its duty under the Constitution to protect Texas from invasion. Illegal aliens are pouring across the Texas Border and invading our state. We are overrun with murderers, rapists, human traffickers, and drugs. The rule of law has been completely subverted.I am proud to announce the release of our comprehensive plan to finally secure the Texas Border, [Operation Clean Sweep](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-y/). [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-j/) Texas must take the lead in stopping the invasion of our border. Using authority given to states under the U.S. Constitution, Texas must implement [Operation Clean Sweep](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-t/) to repel the invasion of its border. By deploying the Texas National Guard, law enforcement, and financial assets, Texas can secure its border and the safety of its citizens.There is nothing magical about reducing the flow of illegal aliens into Texas and other border states. The Trump Administration demonstrated how determined efforts by the U.S. and economic pressure on Mexico could slow the flow of illegals.An all-hands-on-deck effort like [Operation Clean Sweep](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-h/), supported by the people of Texas, will stop illegal immigration. All it requires is a concerted effort to protect the lives, liberty, and property of Texas citizens. [Read Full Paper](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-k/) **The key to a secure Texas Border is a courageous governor willing to put severe economic pressure on Mexico to force them to secure their side of the border.**Please take a moment to read about how [Operation Clean Sweep](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-u/) will actually solve the problems at our Texas Border, not just the symptoms. For Texas,

Don Huffines
President, Huffines Liberty Foundation **ALSO:********Follow****@HuffinesLiberty on all social media platforms (links below)!** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-n/) [Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-p/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-fitwud-yuddtktydi-v/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-fitwud-yuddtktydi-e/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-fitwud-l-s)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fitwud-yuddtktydi-f/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. name: NextGen America
subject: Love at first write…
body:
Send a letter to Congress this Valentine’s Day!

| | | Roses are red, violets are blue, is your crush sending a letter to Congress? Because that’s the hottest thing they can do.
---
| [Send a message too](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710011/391988559/-921895191?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HF061V_EuATcKRplrmoicST7qrSik2EU4gzhdpbrOC8=&emci=43d57e35-6ba6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) |
|
Dear Friend,
As a generation raised amidst a climate crisis, an unjust economy, and unrelenting attacks on our most basic rights, **we know it can be overwhelming when all our news outlets and social media feeds are constant reminders of the chaos we endure.**
That’s why when we meet someone who can cut through all the noise, take control of their lives, and have a say in building a future worth aspiring to, we know we’re swiping right.
**Nothing is sexier than a person who fights for what they believe in...**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710012/391988561/-1325179718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HF061V_EuATcKRplrmoicST7qrSik2EU4gzhdpbrOC8=&emci=43d57e35-6ba6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710013/391988562/-1325179718?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HF061V_EuATcKRplrmoicST7qrSik2EU4gzhdpbrOC8=&emci=43d57e35-6ba6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)
**With a new year ahead, we are diving into our movement with renewed hope and energy — and we came out swinging with our[Youth Agenda](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710014/391988563/1806988164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HF061V_EuATcKRplrmoicST7qrSik2EU4gzhdpbrOC8=&emci=43d57e35-6ba6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172).**
**The Youth Agenda is a list of our priorities, hopes, and vision for the future in the form of an advocacy letter.** And we’re taking this letter all the way to the people who have the power to turn our demands into actionable, transformative change.
When you’re a NextGen advocate, you tap into an incredible community of people who share your values and stand with you when times are tough. We’ve harnessed the power of our collective voice and together, we’ll rise above it all.
[Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710016/391988564/240904223?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HF061V_EuATcKRplrmoicST7qrSik2EU4gzhdpbrOC8=&emci=43d57e35-6ba6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ee6205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")
---
XOXO,
NextGen America

San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://secure.everyaction.com/p/55prEtOmTkiIrUiDBK7vNQ2?unsubscribedata=V02umTecoPaGT7Zhns%2FUSj6UMs5ZhFp%2FPP2O6IUL9%2Bu8ebNKqRcYKlLc%2FnJ2961v3Ia%2B%2Bx1TiId8P4htxTYSDkCCTYwiEeP2l2COUhkdivLioyLlvEQ4U8t5W0dNnaL5rKxAWD45qouZb0KMGqx9OTpZLbsEL7GEMRA8Z7uuM3UQyn%2BLG9dpEQZtnEi1qcQyeLgr0n4xSuvRejdB9Fw215B6FY7ycFNSfxmMm3Hz2UiTp69Bjm1C3hy2wcjQDPyur%2B%2FULV9iZZbmo7%2Bgj3KCCzgTQ8p9pHnjKCj2GmQ%2Bi5iqoKoh32MNHf4HjsdEK%2BQpIm7BKDqPX17hCE8tH6aVQ7LsvCxP9EoaXOwR%2FmFAJ6%2Fs28mziF9nmH97LLnlSIWxFWAH%2FVs7CnhuV6Jo9%2BwLSRqnEWEq%2Fqv3rw5vxCAGNp8%3D)

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710091/391988763/845716153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNjMwNWZmLTg4YWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3sBYvYI0umoSHq7gExbKpxz7_e58h78vM1aAX6MKEzs=&emci=be9bd420-1aab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=026305ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi Peter, Today is not only Valentine's Day. Did you know it’s also Oregon’s birthday? Join us in celebrating this beautiful place we call home, and send an important message to your lawmakers: **[Please show your love for Oregon and our environment by supporting bills that prevent plastic pollution.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710100/391988768/845716153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNjMwNWZmLTg4YWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3sBYvYI0umoSHq7gExbKpxz7_e58h78vM1aAX6MKEzs=&emci=be9bd420-1aab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=026305ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Plastic is everywhere and in everything. It’s used as packaging, it’s in food service products, and it’s in our clothing. All told, Americans generate over 35 million tons of plastic waste every year– that’s enough plastic to fill the Dallas Cowboys stadium every 16 hours, and that amount is increasing. More than 90% of plastic waste is landfilled, incinerated or ends up in our environment. It's time for Oregon to rise above plastic pollution. [And, today is a great day to send a message to your lawmakers asking them to show their love for Oregon and break up with plastic.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710111/391988778/845716153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNjMwNWZmLTg4YWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3sBYvYI0umoSHq7gExbKpxz7_e58h78vM1aAX6MKEzs=&emci=be9bd420-1aab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=026305ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Here are the three priority bills we working to pass:
* **Foam-Free Oregon (Senate Bill 543)** would prohibit the use of polystyrene foam foodware including bowls, plates, cups, lids, clamshells, or other containers and prohibit the sale of polystyrene foam packing peanuts and coolers by January 1, 2025. The bill would also prohibit the use of toxic forever chemicals in foodware containers.
* **Reducing Plastic at the Source (Senate Bill 544)** would require producers to reduce the amount of single-use plastic packaging and foodware by 25% over the next decade and move to reusable and refillable packaging.
* **Enabling Reuse (Senate Bill 545)** would update our health code to enable customers to bring reusable and refillable containers for food.

These three bills are all scheduled for public hearings today so we need lawmakers to hear our support for them. **[Please take a minute to email your state senator and representative encouraging them to ❤️ Oregon and break up with plastics by supporting SB 543, SB 544 & SB 545.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58710114/391988788/845716153?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAyNjMwNWZmLTg4YWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3sBYvYI0umoSHq7gExbKpxz7_e58h78vM1aAX6MKEzs=&emci=be9bd420-1aab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=026305ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Happy Valentine's Day, and Happy Birthday to Oregon! Sincerely,
Julia DeGraw, OLCV Coalition Director | |
---|---|---

name: American Liberty Fund
subject: Pfizer and Project Veritas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Liberty Fund
body:
My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. Dur
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z455n9m267hfqf7bpfh996v437dg32bi7eogddv0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ej3fctmekp76t1heipnacpne4pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdje9i37d3ke6rr1o33mdp3cs5jehon5cj6cip66o37mjhrcc3iehqj0otgmloefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32s5lmoo7ep366hib6phnm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhmeor6cjgm0p36c8iv0)
My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic Pfizer, dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government. | | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zgtec4j4390futg1au29b1d30srd5o0g0rl7nb9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie2o34cph2bs)
[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z85hop85o8tb221gqprbj1rqn5insqmb8j7318io_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie2o34cph2bs) Dear Patriot,

I’m sure by now you’ve seen James O’Keefe’s investigation that exposed Pfizer for working to create a deadlier variant of COVID19.

Within weeks of James releasing that report, his organization, Project Veritas, is in disarray and James’ board of directors has placed him on paid leave.

**It’s no coincidence that this occurred right after they exposed one of the largest industries in the world. These people will CRUSH anyone who stands in their way.**

[**I’m asking for your help to expose Pfizer’s power in politics by funding a series of ads that . . . . TELLS . . . . THE . . .TRUTH.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrm5r2ns3rum62gb54este3l4o1s5o9fk906hi20_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie2o34cph2bs)

[**Please donate today.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z0l82tligogid8he3jhq3bheh18o1bgj93osfb70_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie2o34cph2bs)

I take this very personally. James is a friend and I’m one of the first executive directors of Project Veritas, helping James get the organization off the ground and thriving for seven years.

As a Marine Corps veteran, our motto “Semper Fidelis” – “Always Faithful” will always ring true in my heart when applied to the Corps, my family and my friends.

In politics, there is an infinitesimally small group of men and women who are true believers that fight for Liberty. We’re not in it for the money, fame, power, etc. Most of us try and stay under the radar so we can support each other without the distractions of the media or attacks by the Left (they always still come every once in a while).

**We are a small group, and we are family – and always faithful to each other.**

Mess with one of us, **and you mess with all of us.**

Now, my SuperPAC, American Liberty Fund, is jumping into this fight with everything we have.

My researchers have been digging into the political influence peddling with Pfizer PAC, and I can’t say it’s surprising. During the height of the pandemic, Pfizer dropped $2.6 million on political candidates at all levels of government.

From town mayors to U.S. Senators, checks were cut from Pfizer to buy their silence as they experimented with their plans that were exposed by James O’Keefe.

And let’s not fail to mention Pfizer’s hard lobbying to stop what they call “dangerous” drug price controls. What’s more dangerous? Stopping a company from ripping off sick people, or charging $225k a year for the blockbuster heart drug Vyndaquel?

What kills more people? That answer is obvious.

[**And we’ll be exposing all of this and the links to our elections with your help.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z4sn6406bcub8hmcmmernbbcbvl8kbkqgujognv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie2o34cph2bs)

I’ve been in Washington for over 20 years, so not much shocks me these days, but it may surprise you who took Pfizer political cash as they were pushing out their COVID19 vaccines. And that list is one of the only lists in Washington that includes Pelosi, Schumer, Kevin McCarthy and even Rand Paul.

Your local mayor or state Attorney General may even be on the list.

Pfizer owns almost everyone is Washington.

But they don’t own you, me, James and fighters like us.

[**Help me take a stand and support our work.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zuhopgkvobjrn6cmau5pcaphp3p4kdn1qqh28nu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie2o34cph2bs) The sooner we can start, the more impact we can make, and we won’t be stopping anytime soon!

With Respect and Gratitude,

Shane Cory
Founder and President
American Liberty Fund

P.S. Since 2016, American Liberty Fund has produced hundreds of ads seen by millions of Americans. We hit hard as we don’t owe any industry or politicians any breaks. We help elect FIGHTERS who love Liberty and our nation **. . . and we expose everyone who works against you and your family.[Support us today!](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zeqja9j4uhjqurd15ei7kaestor0d9bbov498alg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie2o34cph2bs)**

P.P.S. Again as a former executive director of Project Veritas, I was with James when it was just a me, him and a few volunteers in a room above a garage. I know James O’Keefe well, and I know his passion and heart. I stand with him. But we cannot support Project Veritas until he is brought back on board and the board members who are attempting to oust him **resign in shame.**

Paid for by American Liberty Fund

15 E Market St #6103
Leesburg, VA 20178

A YouGov poll found that DeSantis leads Trump in a hypothetical head-to-head match-up, 45 percent to 41 percent. But with Haley in the mix, [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ China's 'Unsinkable Super-Carriers' In The South China Sea Are At The Heart of Tensions With The U.S. One of the reasons why experts agree that China may look to invade Taiwan is due to their activity on the many islands and reefs which dot the South China Sea. Starting around 2010, China started to expand their military presence in the South China Sea “which deviated from the United Nations Convention on the [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | #### [ In-Depth Analysis: Connecting 2020 UAV Drones and 2023 Chinese Spy Balloons Assessing the 2019-2020 Colorado and western Nebraska unsolved UAV drone sightings: While the Chinese spy balloons from early February 2023 are still fresh in the collective American memory, many may have forgotten about the strange and widely undiscussed drones or unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) that breached U.S. airspace in early 2020 – understandably so, seeing [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | ** American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | | | | ---|---|---|---|---

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: Where I come from, a house still means a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress **[marcykaptur
body:
I have lived in this district, in the same house, for most of my life. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58691123/391930661/-1372990689?refcode=EM_FR_230214FR_N_MK_45DA_8_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTI4ZTJkOS02OWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibH6YfemxRvUdjRZSjqxriUmSO2U_3bWtwrk-eTUzUw=)
---
I want to talk to you about my house. No, not the House of Representatives, but my childhood home in Toledo, where I still reside today.

Where I come from, a house still means a lot. It represents family and the stake we hold in our community. My grandparents were Polish immigrants choosing to lay down roots and raise their families in Toledo. They instilled diligence and duty into my parents - mom worked in a spark plug factory where she served on the UAW organizing committee, and dad retired from Jeep and ran a small family grocery store.

As the house was passed down, so too were the values of hard work and community service. Because my parents invested in me, I was the first person in my family to go to college. I worked in urban planning and development, but when my community asked me to step up and run for Congress, I answered the call.

I have lived in this district, in the same house, for most of my life. My constituents are friends and neighbors, and I am honored to serve and fight for them.

Governing is not always glamorous. Crafting, amending, and passing legislation is a grueling process that requires the dedication and patience my parents instilled in me. It involves identifying the needs of a community and then fighting hard to bring back the resources needed to help the region thrive.

From funding for job training in our schools or constructing the World War II Memorial to securing funding for a vegetable garden at a senior housing complex and holding back the Asian carp’s invasion of the Great Lakes, no project can be too daunting.

I love this district like I love my house. Our work is both challenging and fulfilling. It is the highest honor of my life to serve our community. I will always put forth my very best effort for the people of Northern Ohio because they deserve nothing less.

**[I’m asking you to help continue this good work in Ohio. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us keep fighting for progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58691124/391930662/-1372990689?refcode=EM_FR_230214FR_N_MK_45DA_8_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTI4ZTJkOS02OWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ibH6YfemxRvUdjRZSjqxriUmSO2U_3bWtwrk-eTUzUw=)** clean_body: I have lived in this district, in the same house, for most of my life. | | = I want to talk to you about my house. No, not the House of Representatives, but my childhood home in Toledo, where I still reside today. Where I come from, a house still means a lot. It represents family and the stake we hold in our community. My grandparents were Polish immigrants choosing to lay down roots and raise their families in Toledo. They instilled diligence and duty into my parents - mom worked in a spark plug factory where she served on the UAW organizing committee, and dad retired from Jeep and ran a small family grocery store. As the house was passed down, so too were the values of hard work and community service. Because my parents invested in me, I was the first person in my family to go to college. I worked in urban planning and development, but when my community asked me to step up and run for Congress, I answered the call. I have lived in this district, in the same house, for most of my life. My constituents are friends and neighbors, and I am honored to serve and fight for them. Governing is not always glamorous. Crafting, amending, and passing legislation is a grueling process that requires the dedication and patience my parents instilled in me. It involves identifying the needs of a community and then fighting hard to bring back the resources needed to help the region thrive. From funding for job training in our schools or constructing the World War II Memorial to securing funding for a vegetable garden at a senior housing complex and holding back the Asian carp’s invasion of the Great Lakes, no project can be too daunting. I love this district like I love my house. Our work is both challenging and fulfilling. It is the highest honor of my life to serve our community. I will always put forth my very best effort for the people of Northern Ohio because they deserve nothing less. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Marcy Kaptur | | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. subject: Omar- FIRED. Swalwell- FIRED. Schiff- FIRED.

body:
Let’s set the record straight.

| |
---
| | | Let's set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump's supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

I promised you that if we took back the majority, I would bring decency and justice to the people's House.

---

---

I will not stop until we get this country back on track. But the Democrats are FURIOUS at what we have been doing.

Even now, Omar, Schiff, and Swalell are raising MILLIONS off their terminations. They will not stop until they return to power.

We cannot let this happen. I promise to fight with everything I have to stop this from happening, and with your support, we will succeed.

**[Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgtdtg06v5a7h8v0d6nt17f4nfckv8qeebav52j8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3cpie1pb4cjh2bs "Can I ask that you chip in $1, $5, $10 or anything you might be able to give to help us take on the dark money Democrats and protect our Conservative House Majority?")**

Thank you,
Speaker Kevin McCarthy

name: Eric (personal)
subject: I ❤️ our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Friend, I wanted to send over a quick note and tell you how much I appreciate you being a part of our team this Valentine’s Day. I’ll be honest, sometimes the chaos, frustration, and obstructionism of Washington get to me. And on those days, I’m reminded of why I am here.
Friend, I wanted to send over a quick note and tell you how much I appreciate you being a part of our team this Valentine’s Day. I’ll be honest, sometimes the chaos, frustration, and obstructionism of Washington get to me. And on those days, I’m reminded of why I am here.
I’m here because I love our democracy. I love that despite every challenge and obstacle we have faced, our democracy lives on because there are people like you and me fighting for it. And, friend, I’m here because you believe in our team.
I hope you and your loved ones have a wonderful Valentine’s Day! If you want to show some love to our campaign so we can keep fighting to protect our democracy, you can donate at this personalized link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Feb2023-FR-February?refcode=EricPersonal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58715113/392006337/1324349186?refcode=E20293-20230214-ValentinesDay-SL-Holiday-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzZhZDg5Ni05NWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_nO_xZSDxe8VVTarE2J7WctYP1Ip2OdoUjSaC1HThk=)
Thanks for everything you do,
Eric

clean_body: the GOP are going after abortion rights | Derek, We already knew that Glenn Youngkin’s budget called for money to be set aside to jail women who get abortions. Now, they want law enforcement to be able to gain access to menstrual cycle tracking apps. I’ll admit that I don’t have a degree in advanced mathematics – but I know that 1+1 is 2, and I think we can all do the math here. The only way we can protect abortion rights in Virginia is to win majorities in 2023.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** Nick Scott VADEMS Digital Director ******=****** ******=******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. name: Scott Walker
subject: #1 Threat to America’s Future
body:
Today, the #1 threat to America’s future is the radical leftist ideology plaguing our nation’s young people.

| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4mu77me7mbktob85burcan8tmglfcjvhc55pqu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g64oj0sph2bs)

NEXT: Senator Scott announced his 2024 re-election campaign to continue to represent the people of Florida and push back on the Washington Insiders. THEN: Senator Scott was removed from a Senate Committee by Mitch McConnell for challenging him for Republican Leader and demanding conservatives STOP caving to the Democrats. THE LATEST: Mitch McConnell is now the only congressional leader in history to attack a member of his own party who is up for re-election, on the very same day that Joe Biden did, using the same false left-wing talking points. | | | | Thank you, Team Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Ruben Gallego for AZ
subject: Humbly asking if you can make your first online donation before our February drive ends.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’ve fallen behind and the timing is less than ideal.
#

Peter -
When Ruben Gallego launched this campaign, he had no idea what to expect. He knew a lot of people would probably give to beat Senator Sinema, but it was a big question as to whether or not we’d have the huge outpouring of grassroots support we needed to win.
Within minutes, a teacher from Tucson chipped in.
Then a mechanic from Chandler.
Then a student in Tempe.
And we were off.
But today we’re asking: is there ANYTHING we can say to convince YOU to add your first online donation to Ruben’s Senate campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close tomorrow? Our fundraising has slowed and the timing is not great.
So please — especially because February is notoriously tough for fundraising and we’ve fallen behind this month:
[**Can you please make your first online contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today? We’ve fallen behind on our February fundraising goals and need your help to catch up before tomorrow at midnight.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230214-1-7&t=1&akid=392%2E734936%2Eqei0I1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-feb23.sph-To&refcode=em230214-1-7&t=20&akid=392%2E734936%2Eqei0I1)**

****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-feb23.EBks4w&refcode=em230214-1-7&t=22&akid=392%2E734936%2Eqei0I1)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-feb23.8_Mc_3&refcode=em230214-1-7&t=23&akid=392%2E734936%2Eqei0I1)**

---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-feb23.CFC4vE&refcode=em230214-1-7&t=25&akid=392%2E734936%2Eqei0I1)**

****
Thank you in advance for all you’ve done and for giving today. It really means a lot to Ruben.
Ruben Gallego for Senate
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230214-1-7&t=26&akid=392%2E734936%2Eqei0I1)

| | | Senator Rick Scott (R-FL) is still pushing hard on [his plan to eliminate Social Security and Medicare within 5 years](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc2161a40-aa3b-43c6-bd24-b27a975b5cba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And many other Republicans are embracing it, as President Biden pointed out in his State of the Union address. They are using euphemisms, such as "sunsetting" the programs, or "reforming" them. But the plan speaks for itself -- **Social Security and Medicare will be eliminated.** Republicans need to drop this plan immediately -- and they need to say so unambiguously. And they need to hear that from as many people as possible as often as possible until they do. [**Demand Republicans Drop Their Plan to End Social Security and Medicare >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddf17fcf-d0aa-401f-9cf4-f580e2e09df2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Florida’s Blueprint for America’s Revival
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=eabcc4e5e29ff463638724150483f0877996f45ae45dad3d921f3e5f7dd29dcda4aad33f10561f5b1c4f951d9e282458174b42c5df07d314037d2e77f98009011c5d7127255816225ba8c1006d99d622

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82752a94b9b3f48b2f6980dc2e1d6ff407b4dcb31f59d23671bb9772b6876c8a38fa94af05b67b1c997d7cb3af1408ec51f4f21a5f4fd0a8

Peter,

Governor DeSantis’ new book, ”The Courage to Be Free: Florida’s Blueprint for America’s Revival,” provides a first-hand account of the decisions that went into making Florida the citadel of freedom.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82752a94b9b3f48b2f6980dc2e1d6ff407b4dcb31f59d23671bb9772b6876c8a38fa94af05b67b1c997d7cb3af1408ec51f4f21a5f4fd0a8
ENTER NOW FOR A CHANCE TO WIN A SIGNED COPY

Governor DeSantis delivered a historic, record-setting re-election victory — winning by nearly 20 points and more than 1.5 million votes.

Throughout his first term, the Governor’s Freedom Agenda produced tangible results for the people of Florida:

▪️ Ensuring parental rights in education

▪️ Securing communities

▪️ Providing record tax relief

▪️ Restoring the environment

The Governor’s book shares key moments in his own words for the first time: growing up in a working-class family, playing in the Little League World Series, working his way through school, serving in the Navy, and his relentless fight to Keep Florida Free. This book provides a first-hand account of the experiences that have shaped the Governor’s leadership to serve the people of his state and defend the values that we all share.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82752a94b9b3f48b2f6980dc2e1d6ff407b4dcb31f59d23671bb9772b6876c8a38fa94af05b67b1c997d7cb3af1408ec51f4f21a5f4fd0a8
>>">Don’t miss your chance to win your very own signed copy of Governor DeSantis’ book! >>>

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82752a94b9b3f48b1fb85b53834653350c6902b453dda8340b5fe31ce44b5e5b14eff8acb1bc0b0987894f1b48337dc423679f5b6bd8cd65

Governor DeSantis said it best: “What Florida has done is establish a blueprint for governance that is producing tangible results, while serving as a rebuke to the entrenched elites who have driven our nation into the ground. Florida is proof positive that We, The People, are not powerless in the face of these elites.”

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82752a94b9b3f48b2f6980dc2e1d6ff407b4dcb31f59d23671bb9772b6876c8a38fa94af05b67b1c997d7cb3af1408ec51f4f21a5f4fd0a8
Stand with Governor DeSantis today and enter for your chance to win a signed copy of “The Courage to Be Free: Florida’s Blueprint for America’s Revival.”

For freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82752a94b9b3f48b2f6980dc2e1d6ff407b4dcb31f59d23671bb9772b6876c8a38fa94af05b67b1c997d7cb3af1408ec51f4f21a5f4fd0a8

Dianne Feinstein, who has been a member of the U.S. Senate since 1992, announced Tuesday that she will not seek re-election in 2024. Her statement read, "I am announcing today I will not run for reelection in 2024 but intend to accomplish as much for California as I can through the end [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | #### [ Poll Watch: Nikki Haley and Other Candidates Cutting Into DeSantis' 2024 Challenge In the wake of Nikki Haley’s 2024 announcement, new polling has shown that Florida Governor Ron DeSantis’ support is being eroded by Haley and other candidates who are not Donald Trump. A YouGov poll found that DeSantis leads Trump in a hypothetical head-to-head match-up, 45 percent to 41 percent. But with Haley in the mix, [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | #### [ In-Depth Analysis: Connecting 2020 UAV Drones and 2023 Chinese Spy Balloons Assessing the 2019-2020 Colorado and western Nebraska unsolved UAV drone sightings: While the Chinese spy balloons from early February 2023 are still fresh in the collective American memory, many may have forgotten about the strange and widely undiscussed drones or unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) that breached U.S. airspace in early 2020 – understandably so, seeing [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | | ** American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | | | | ---|---|---|---|---

| | Thank you for joining my list of supporters, friend! I proudly serve as a U.S. Representative for Minnesota's 1st District, and speaking to new followers and voters is extremely important to me. I count on your constant feedback to be the best representative I can be. I am here to represent Minnesotans, protect farmers, uphold constitutional rights, and lead using my faith in God, family, and freedom.
---
| | _**Connect with me:**_ Take a couple of minutes to check out my social channels and follow me to ensure you get the latest and greatest updates from my campaign. Thank you for sharing your thoughts. I look forward to doing whatever it takes to stand up for Minnesotans and Americans during this tumultuous time living under the reign of Joe Biden and his left-wing cohorts.
---

I proudly serve as a U.S. Representative for Minnesota's 1st District, and speaking to new followers and voters is extremely important to me. I count on your constant feedback to be the best representative I can be. I am here to represent Minnesotans, protect farmers, uphold constitutional rights, and lead using my faith in God, family, and freedom. | | Connect with me: Take a couple of minutes to check out my social channels and follow me to ensure you get the latest and greatest updates from my campaign. Thank you for sharing your thoughts. I look forward to doing whatever it takes to stand up for Minnesotans and Americans during this tumultuous time living under the reign of Joe Biden and his left-wing cohorts. | | | Thank you, Brad Finstad U.S. Congressman | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

subject: ALERT: Orland Park Village President Pekau Seeks Chicago-Style Government
body:
Former congressional candidate Keith Pekau seeks to transform Orland Park into Chicago or Aurora, inviting corruption.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c6b3a3857924/alert-orland-park-village-president-pekau-seeks-chicago-style-government?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Keith Pekau Ran in 2017 on Reducing Part-Time Mayoral Salary from $150k to $40k, Now He Wants It Back After Losing Congressional Race (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/keith-pekau-ran-in-2017-on-reducing-part-time-mayoral-salary-from-150k-to-40k-now-he-wants-it-back-after-losing-congressional-race.html?fbclid=IwAR2Jfb5hUsp1I_25IgCFudB6W26iUNAnRJEmQu4ObxtdBl2J_ik3nn4e4fk&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In 2017, Keith Pekau ran for Village President of Orland Park on a single issue (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1SR4iPny-cg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) : reduce the salary from $150,000 to $40,000. And his logic was simple.

Orland Park is a council-manager form of government where the Village Board of Trustees employs a full-time Village Manager to handle day-to-day operations, and therefore, there is no legitimate need to pay the head of the Board – the Village President, a six-figure salary.

Pekau
won big (https://patch.com/illinois/orlandpark/live-orland-park-election-2017-follow-vote-totals-here?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in 2017, ousting longtime Village President of 24 years, Dan McLaughlin, by exposing how the difference in salary would impact the payout of McLaughlin’s pension by $2.1M (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-jT3SAp7vTk&t=225s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) dollars.

But once Pekau took office, he continued to collect the
$150,000 salary (https://patch.com/illinois/orlandpark/pekau-take-mayoral-salary-pass-pension?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) annually for four straight years, netting himself $600,000 ($150,000 in each of 2018 (https://www.orlandpark.org/home/showpublisheddocument/1986/637653924538000000?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , 2019 (https://www.orlandpark.org/home/showpublisheddocument/1988/637653924543000000?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , 2020 (https://www.orlandpark.org/home/showpublisheddocument/4642/637810496526530000?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and 2021) as the part-time Village President of Orland Park.
Orland Park Village President Keith Pekau addressing media on Election Day, Nov. 8, 2023 (Source: CBS Chicago).

Pekau argued that he was “bound” to collect the $150,000 annually, as the salary decrease would not take effect until the following term.

While Pekau may have been bound to collect the full salary, he was not bound to keep it and could have donated the $110,000 difference to charity, but Pekau did not.

President Donald J. Trump gave away his
$400,000 presidential salary (https://www.forbes.com/sites/adamandrzejewski/2021/02/27/president-donald-trump-probably-donated-his-entire-16m-salary-back-to-the-us-government--here-are-the-details/?sh=3e3462c1a8dc&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on a quarterly basis throughout his tenure as President of the United States.

In 2021, Pekau narrowly won re-election as Village President of Orland Park, beating former Village President Dan McLaughlin by just
510 votes (https://patch.com/illinois/orlandpark/mclaughlin-concedes-keith-pekau-wins-orland-park-mayoral-race?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Upon securing his re-election, Pekau was forced to start collecting the
$40,000 salary (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-mayor-what-comes-next-st-1113-20221111-pnvnaix5ifhurj4caqeqcyshju-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that was the centerpiece of his 2017 campaign.

But there was an escape plan.

Pekau would run for Congress and if he won, he’d collect the
$174,000 congressional salary (https://crsreports.congress.gov/product/pdf/RL/RL30064?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D#:~:text=The%20compensation%20for%20most%20Senators,from%20Puerto%20Rico%20is%20%24174%2C000.&text=The%20House%2Dreported%20(H.R.,continue%20the%20freeze%20in%202023.) – a salary far bigger than anything Pekau ever had collected before.

New York Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez famously worked as a bartender (https://money.com/alexandria-ocasio-cortez-career/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) earning less than $30,000 (https://disclosures-clerk.house.gov/public_disc/financial-pdfs/2018/10026781.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in 2018 before winning the lottery and becoming the representative of NY-14, where she more than quintupled her salary to $174,000.

Pekau lost his bid for Congress by more than
9 points (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/egofske-will-serve-as-mayor-state-rep-durkin-who-voted-for-weapons-ban-calls-him-outstanding-public-servant.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . It was a blowout that few saw coming, as just days before his election, Pekau had now-Speaker Kevin McCarthy (R, CA-20) at a fundraiser (https://www.chicagotribune.com/politics/elections/ct-illinois-6th-joe-biden-kevin-mccarthy-20221105-xxwp6vb4h5ge7gr2pb2s4gln34-story.html?fbclid=IwAR2EyZ9s_3QQs3ovUMtsEvTUVn54BN0z0jzKR0QGes5ObbhkftmNn142jes&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in Oak Brook.

Pekau gushed recently after McCarthy became the Speaker that in an apparent
private conversation (https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=598239848978851&set=a.244840540985452&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) between the two, McCarthy told Pekau they would get along so long as Pekau did not surprise the future Speaker.

But in a calculated move, made only after Pekau confirmed that his hand-picked trustees were not going to be
challenged (https://www.youtube.com/watch?app=desktop&v=UnAkWqhJjfA&fbclid=IwAR2nqkLXekn9UQqjZ7Ib1P7uBj09eoBW_UEagWPVP6Wp0i9apcFrtB07YTo&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the April 4 elections, did Pekau release his latest surprise – a referendum (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyFime2PoLw&t=2316s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to convert Orland Park from its council-manager style of government – like the #1 safest city (https://chicago.suntimes.com/news/2023/2/8/23590923/naperville-safest-city-joliet-moneygeek-fbi-crime-data?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in America, Naperville – to a mayor-council style of government like Chicago or Aurora.

In other words, by elevating the Village President position to full-time, Chicago-style mayor, and at the same time eliminating the need for a full-time Village Manager, Pekau would be set to reclaim his former $150,000 salary, and the pension perks that come with it.

Mayor Lori Lightfoot of Chicago is facing 8 challengers for re-election and is trailing (https://www.fox32chicago.com/news/chicago-mayoral-election-new-poll-shows-vallas-garcia-as-frontrunners?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the polls.

Mayor Richard Irvin of Aurora was blown out of the water in the June 28th Republican gubernatorial primary, losing to conservative candidate Darren Bailey by
43 points (https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/chicago-politics/illinois-primary-election-results-republican-darren-bailey-to-face-jb-pritzker-in-race-for-illinois-governor-in-november/2869100/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

A Democrat
supported (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=0000017e-6d5c-dbc8-a1ff-7d7dbf990000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by the IL GOP, Irvin participated in BLM rallies during the Summer of 2020, in one instance, yelling “I Can’t Breathe! (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QOyFraLPPLo&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ” during a local protest.

Orland Park, a village of just over 50,000 residents, has been a manager-council form of government since
1983 (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-form-of-government-referendum-st-0118-20230117-lf5fswuikfb33frb7ejkoma43y-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . That managerial style relies on a full-time Village Manager who reports directly to the Village Board of Trustees, of which the Village President is the chair.

Orland Park’s current Village Manager has held that position since 2019, after Pekau
pushed out (https://www.chicagotribune.com/suburbs/daily-southtown/ct-sta-orland-park-village-manager-st-0508-story.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the former Village Manager.

The current Village Manager recently became a finalist (https://www.janesvillewi.gov/Home/Components/News/News/15572/29?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for the Village Manager position in Janesville, Wisconsin.

The referendum on the ballot for Orland Park residents is whether the Village of Orland Park should retain its council-manager style of government.

A vote in favor is to keep the status quo.

A vote against is to opt for Chicago-style politics.

A ballot initiative committee,
Vote Yes Orland Park (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/CommitteeDetail.aspx?ID=ocrtcw68y8F8olx6khtpGg%3d%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , has published a website (https://voteyesorland.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) containing information sourced by the International City/County Management Association (https://icma.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , a trade association for village managers.

The consolidated elections take place on April 4, 2023, and early voting begins on February 28, 2023.

https://youtu.be/SaR7eZSCIoc?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Publisher Scott Kaspar joins Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer to discuss the losing streak of IL Attorney General Kwame Raoul, who has been losing one TRO after another on Pritzker's Assault Weapons Ban (Feb. 12, 2023).

https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=57ece3cd1d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_05_51&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-57ece3cd1d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

| | _**A Personal Note from Jason:**_
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a010234ba67b4c529ba406581e1b5984&_e=1uqqYo6hl_jAKS5UzQy2Sh5WSSQzbM96x_Gw74rxAnMrvelgeNo1Nlbl9yhMnpHqr27UHMhMW-os3d97cnRgAQaOOap5ao5N1-AC-fz9zyDw1GfdgbqjalKAna4WwDaVufvJhCZgESh5McaFZaScBz032VJoEgnaI-QMcparjEefrHlvuBdqjQkgM29b-lLY1ORIhI4M8xCIjwlvLXAhwxqwB_eN3FwWRzwz9vtNzKD740Ustfu4ISB3p8KBx9qtWhuCWT5BHlYICES8KcohdqrO2KKL2X13D4xvCPI1YuZpOND_SVndje-vsYSsmLbp7AWersSGFAzEeTuAvtkz3v1AnG54ngNhsAmU53YFpb8%3D)
---
50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=a010234ba67b4c529ba406581e1b5984&_e=1uqqYo6hl_jAKS5UzQy2Sh5WSSQzbM96x_Gw74rxAnMrvelgeNo1Nlbl9yhMnpHqr27UHMhMW-os3d97cnRgAQaOOap5ao5N1-AC-fz9zyDw1GfdgbqjalKAna4WwDaVufvJhCZgESh5McaFZaScBz032VJoEgnaI-QMcparjEefrHlvuBdqjQkgM29b-lLY1ORIhI4M8xCIjwlvLXAhw3UOroeAIImkppziy_PLcw81kkpTOhWF_3aww-Yy2_AN7JKbjyxM4MQUpRxXnyOzdevGk1fOV1prfgnDhGdj2vU-FJeGISVY3P2jFEmzIejKJCoLEENhyyie7u-Ee-UoOsQCaZscxbjAzkDvFBQhONk%3D)

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Parkland, Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s been five years since the massacre at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida
#

Friends -
Today, we mark five years since the tragedy at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida. But instead of focusing our energy remembering the seventeen lives lost, we’re pulled to respond to yet another tragedy on a school campus, this time at Michigan State University.
This tells you everything you need to know about America’s gun violence crisis. Layer upon layer of preventable tragedy. Some of the same students who survived the shooting at Oxford High School in Michigan a year ago are now living through the trauma of last night’s shooting.
Yesterday, students at MSU had an ordinary day—shuttling between classes and sharing meals in the dining halls. Five years ago today, students at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School began the day in an ordinary way too.
They sat through morning announcements, which included the daily affirmation "Life supports me in every way possible." There was a Valentine's Day reminder to all students that "love has many definitions, but abuse isn't one of them."
Everything about the morning of February 14, 2018 was typical. But then, the afternoon turned into an unfathomable nightmare. Police officers rushed in toward classrooms with their guns drawn while a gunman opened fire in hallways and classrooms. Students were evacuated from the school, unsure about the fate of their teachers and friends.
Fourteen students and three teachers were killed by the senseless actions of the gunman in Parkland. Seventeen innocent lives gone too soon.
Now, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children in America. This is a statistic that makes my heart ache, and it’s a driving force for me as to why we must keep moving forward in our work to end gun violence.
It’s been five years since Parkland, but we still have a long way to go to make our communities safe from the imminent threat of gun violence. We must continue to work towards a future where commonsense measures like universal background checks can prevent future tragedies.
No child should go to school with the fear that they won’t return home afterwards. No college student should fear for their life in the student center. We’re so much better than this constant fear and carnage.
Today, I hope you’ll join me in honoring the seventeen victims of the Parkland massacre with action. [**If you’re able to, you can use this link to make a contribution to Giffords PAC to fuel our work toward safer communities.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230214-1-15&t=1&akid=4260%2E3935704%2E9nd_As)
We cannot rest until we see a future where our children and our communities are safe. Thank you for standing with me in this struggle.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4260%2E3935704%2E9nd_As) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Getting troops the body armor they needed in Iraq
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Take a look at this.
#
See this?
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-feb23.2sWM73&refcode=em230214-1-15&t=1&akid=7353%2E3013755%2EDKiJaM)
It’s a GIF from a TV ad we ran back in 2006 hammering Republican Senators who voted against giving our troops the body armor they needed in Iraq.
It helped defeat a few Republican Senators, including George Allen.
It helped change the debate about body armor in Iraq.
It saved lives.
The point is, for a long time VoteVets has been there running some of the most powerful ads every election — elevating the voices of Veterans every election.
We’ve been there from the start.

body:
Read Immediately

| | | | **Nikki Haley is running for President!**
