Priority Level: High

RESPOND NOW:** **[**I Endorse Nikki Haley**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztp3bsm4dqn11chfeli2hi2bn0b2fvbfnuadnoto_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6epb4cph2bs)**
Our team was reviewing the list and we noticed your endorsement of Nikki Haley was missing!

It's time for a new generation of bold, conservative leadership in Washington, and Nikki Haley is running for president to take back our country and claw back Americans' freedom from the radical Left!

Biden is leading our country toward the brink of destruction -- cratering our economy, eroding our fundamental freedoms, dismantling our borders, and emboldening our adversaries.

[**Instead of sitting on the sidelines while our country is on the line, join Nikki 's fight!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkhqvg5ucb5rckuolr64rtds3btdc1uo40pglnu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6epb4cph2bs)
-Take 30 Seconds- **[**< < Endorse Nikki Haley for President >>**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf485ceb6blc9nm8mpoukhrc0vhpd0bqf4gur11g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6epb4cph2bs)**
Our fundamental freedoms will be in serious danger if conservatives don't back a proven leader and winner in 2024. Not only has Nikki won every race she's run, she has a record of proven leadership.

As two-term governor of South Carolina, Nikki proved she could run an economy, bringing unemployment to a 15-year low and securing $20 billion in new capital investments.

When hurricanes and the tragedy at AME Church shook the state, she demonstrated leadership in crisis, bringing people together to recover and heal.

And as U.S. Ambassador to the UN, Nikki showed the world American strength. She stood up for Israel, paved the way for exiting the Iran nuclear deal, and facilitated the harshest sanctions on North Korea in over a generation -- negotiating with Russia and China to seal the deal.

Now is the time to decide. [**Will you support Nikki Haley for president by giving her your endorsement before midnight?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdhdqhd91o7ral5gqer8s9mh6pcb3eph534tpqd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6epb4cph2bs)

body:

| | | | | Peter, **_OUTSTANDING!!_** _**Adam Frisch, who only lost to loathsome Lauren Boebert by 546 votes, just announced he is running against her again in 2024!!**_ **_And there's no reason to think he won't beat her if he has the resources he needs, in what will be a presidential year w/ higher Democratic turnout _****_in Colorado_**** _._** [**_Can you RUSH Adam Frisch $5, $10 or $25 or whatever you can for a HUGE launch and great start making up 547 votes and ridding our Capitol of seditionist Lauren Boebert?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taeeca296-63d0-48f2-8d57-895057a80efa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) From his announcement on Twitter: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e510026-c6ec-45a6-848a-7955cf668208/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**Meanwhile, Boebert either didn't learn a thing from her close shave or is simply unable to learn. August of 2022 her neighbor called 911 because Boebert and her husband--who was arrested in the past for exposing himself to teenage girls at a bowling alley--threatened them.**_ That's a sentence I never imagined having to write.
---
|

| **_Boebert wants to arrest everyone who investigated Trump, impeach President Biden--just because--and defund Ukraine so Putin can annihilate the country. These are the positions of a fascist. Just because she's stupid, don't let it convince you she's not dangerous. She's both._** [**_Can you RUSH Adam Frisch $5, $10 or $25 or whatever you can for a HUGE launch and great start making up 547 votes and ridding our Capitol of seditionist Lauren Boebert?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40570680-360b-4ff5-8d96-55518d55b085/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This race is so important. | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb42c4e30-a3bf-4c8d-a64c-1914bc5551eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Ban assault weapons. Now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
This is a longer email, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll read to the end.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58706200/391974032/823540626?refcode=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTkwMmE1Yy04MGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZD8I5thUQv-cqIstDc2aKjn9C4x5VZKSwq7s5MTvMJE=&emci=84a67a17-c9ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — In the five years since the massacre at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, teenage survivors have turned into lifelong activists. They took up a cause that never should have been forced upon them because they saw that action was not coming soon enough. **It’s long past time to pass a new ban on assault weapons.** As President Biden said in the State of the Union address earlier this month, when the 1994 assault weapons ban was in effect, deaths from mass shootings fell. When it expired, they rose sharply. **[The evidence is clear. We need a new assault weapons ban NOW. If you agree, take just a moment to add your name to our petition here calling on the GOP to get on board>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58706201/391974033/529334032?refcode=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTkwMmE1Yy04MGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZD8I5thUQv-cqIstDc2aKjn9C4x5VZKSwq7s5MTvMJE=&emci=84a67a17-c9ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** Last year, an elementary school in Uvalde, Texas suffered the third-deadliest school shooting in American history. At Uvalde, and at the massacres in Parkland and Sandy Hook before, the murderers used AR-15-style weapons to commit unspeakable violence. Peter, there are too many of these weapons of war too easily available, and they should not be on our streets. President Biden and I have long called for a ban on assault weapons, but we haven’t been able to enact it because Republicans _refuse_ to prioritize saving American lives over advancing their political agenda. They _refuse_ to see what is blindingly obvious: that America has a gun violence problem. **[Our children are being murdered in their schools. We cannot allow it to stand. Peter, on the 5th anniversary of the Parkland shooting, I join survivors in a demand for action. Please, sign on to tell Republicans to set partisanship aside and ban assault weapons NOW.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58706202/391974034/529334032?refcode=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTkwMmE1Yy04MGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZD8I5thUQv-cqIstDc2aKjn9C4x5VZKSwq7s5MTvMJE=&emci=84a67a17-c9ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58706203/391974035/529334032?refcode=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTkwMmE1Yy04MGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZD8I5thUQv-cqIstDc2aKjn9C4x5VZKSwq7s5MTvMJE=&emci=84a67a17-c9ab-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=29902a5c-80ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

name: Nikki =?UTF-8?Q?Haley=E2=80=99s?= Story
subject: As American as apple pie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SFA, Inc
body:
This American story begins with a woman named Raj Randhawa from Punjab

The Left can't handle it, but this is the truth
ACTION REQUIRED: Step up before it's too late.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeqdd1gd3cuiautlfpudc5in6hbtq78kgt75vg3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6eo71c3h2bs) | This American story begins with a woman named Raj Randhawa from Punjab, India who dreamed of serving on the country's judicial bench. She worked hard, earned her law degree, and was offered a seat on the court. Only then, her family's disapproval stopped her from taking it.

Because of her belief in the American Dream, Raj and her husband, Ajit, immigrated to America and settled in Bamberg, South Carolina where they had and raised their children to have faith in God and love their country.

**They would never have guessed everything their daughter, Nikki Haley, would do with the risk they took to achieve the American Dream.**

At age 12, Nikki started working in her mother's dress shop and learned the hard work behind every dollar earned.

When she learned it was too easy for the government to take and spend that dollar without accountability, she ran for the South Carolina state legislature.

She stood up to corrupt Republicans and insiders in her state that wanted to spend taxpayer dollars on their pet projects without any accountability. She championed a law forcing them to be on the record for every single spending bill. They tried to punish her by taking her spot in Republican leadership for it.

But she kept fighting. She never lost a race. And went on to serve two terms as South Carolina's governor until Trump called on her to stand for America as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations.

Nikki's story is an American story. In just one generation, she pulled herself up through hard work and determination.

She didn't blame America when the going got tough. She knows it's America's unique promise of freedom and opportunity that made her story possible in the first place.

_**Now, she 's running for president to protect the American Dream and stop the Left from erasing our country's fundamental values with their woke, socialist agenda.**_

[**Will you chip in $25 or more to join Nikki 's fight and help her to victory?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z668aspaf3ro93qeuq3172mr3bq9lksv0rv22suo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6eo71c3h2bs)** ** How the story ends and the future of our country depends on pro-freedom patriots like YOU.
**[**BE A PART OF NIKKI 'S STORY **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrsq20sd02sik1qjk7ppdhs8vrn79uiitj7r2ff0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6eo71c3h2bs)**
---

**It 's time to elect the next generation of conservative leaders who will stand for America. **

[**If you agree, stand with Nikki Haley now in her fight to defend freedom and save the American Dream.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt0mpjanj29c7akti8lq858samof6oh8t4atvb0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6eo71c3h2bs)

**[**JOIN NIKKI 'S FIGHT NOW **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpl7pm2k2l80flkh7h6bou5e1dek849ohl43eku8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g6eo71c3h2bs)**

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Why I love America ❤️
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gz50gqha-6QP93Bby6pxIXJidD6P19IWXUAFlFGuG2lcDRMS-4H4NEa4xTpK54Sh0u5Rp_q2hs_OT5TJprwEDd8sH54kc3JhBfx6jQzJqRkyxwfY-084BkhBIjW0kShrFYg6aKwBMlFKyS_4TOhsjpWRWQ8byJU9BAXLV9LDZX8Ppl3B5zk8CLcsLT8WMCjgbclniqZvHRU=&c=ozPuVFTgz1X7cr6BV1ZXr9MXoV8ejTZEIqnv9aIFLy55dIR-sMBUEw==&ch=6XMizg2osQktzrnViBU5XwQ2mN5eMpEyGhKJqvgLapWc-YhrWNOUeg==)
---
| Friend
Today is all about love, so I wanted to reach out and let you know why I love our country.
From the busy streets of New York City to the sunny shores of Florida, our nation lives and breathes freedom. America is the product of what can happen when millions of dreams come together to build something awe-inspiring, and I'm proud to call myself a part of it.
People come from across the world to be a part of the American Dream, and Friend I love our nation.
I love our nation because our history is not one of kings or dictators; our history is one of liberty, freedom, and the fight to ensure all are held equally. I stand for these ideals every day in our Congress, and it's why I will ALWAYS believe that we are the greatest nation ever to exist.
America is a place where anyone can achieve their dreams, and while in Congress, I intend to keep it that way. I fight to ensure our nation represents the traditions and values our founders laid down for us, and I promise to keep the American Dream alive for generations to come.
Florida is an example to every state of what we can achieve when we fight for our values, and while we continue to report win after win, my fight is only getting started...
Today, things may be challenging with Biden in office, but despite the Left's attempts to cast aside the values that made our nation great, I'll always be in the fight. I'll never stop fighting to put our country and its people first, and while I do, [I hope you will support my efforts to keep our nation great!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gz50gqha-6QP93Bby6pxIXJidD6P19IWXUAFlFGuG2lcDRMS-4H4NEa4xTpK54Sh0u5Rp_q2hs_OT5TJprwEDd8sH54kc3JhBfx6jQzJqRkyxwfY-084BkhBIjW0kShrFYg6aKwBMlFKyS_4TOhsjpWRWQ8byJU9BAXLV9LDZX8Ppl3B5zk8CLcsLT8WMCjgbclniqZvHRU=&c=ozPuVFTgz1X7cr6BV1ZXr9MXoV8ejTZEIqnv9aIFLy55dIR-sMBUEw==&ch=6XMizg2osQktzrnViBU5XwQ2mN5eMpEyGhKJqvgLapWc-YhrWNOUeg==)
For the Land of the Free,
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gz50gqha-6QP93Bby6pxIXJidD6P19IWXUAFlFGuG2lcDRMS-4H4NEa4xTpK54Sh0u5Rp_q2hs_OT5TJprwEDd8sH54kc3JhBfx6jQzJqRkyxwfY-084BkhBIjW0kShrFYg6aKwBMlFKyS_4TOhsjpWRWQ8byJU9BAXLV9LDZX8Ppl3B5zk8CLcsLT8WMCjgbclniqZvHRU=&c=ozPuVFTgz1X7cr6BV1ZXr9MXoV8ejTZEIqnv9aIFLy55dIR-sMBUEw==&ch=6XMizg2osQktzrnViBU5XwQ2mN5eMpEyGhKJqvgLapWc-YhrWNOUeg==)

clean_body: | | | | == | Friend Today is all about love, so I wanted to reach out and let you know why I love our country. From the busy streets of New York City to the sunny shores of Florida, our nation lives and breathes freedom. America is the product of what can happen when millions of dreams come together to build something awe-inspiring, and I'm proud to call myself a part of it. People come from across the world to be a part of the American Dream, and Friend I love our nation. I love our nation because our history is not one of kings or dictators; our history is one of liberty, freedom, and the fight to ensure all are held equally. I stand for these ideals every day in our Congress, and it's why I will ALWAYS believe that we are the greatest nation ever to exist. America is a place where anyone can achieve their dreams, and while in Congress, I intend to keep it that way. I fight to ensure our nation represents the traditions and values our founders laid down for us, and I promise to keep the American Dream alive for generations to come. Florida is an example to every state of what we can achieve when we fight for our values, and while we continue to report win after win, my fight is only getting started... Today, things may be challenging with Biden in office, but despite the Left's attempts to cast aside the values that made our nation great, I'll always be in the fight. I'll never stop fighting to put our country and its people first, and while I do, == For the Land of the Free, | == | Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: the right thing to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
A few days before Election Day, POLITICO and other campaign experts were calling our race in New Hampshire a “toss up.”
| | |
---
Hello,

A few days before Election Day, POLITICO and other campaign experts were calling our race in New Hampshire a “toss up.”

We knew we could win, but it became clear in those final days that we were going to need to spend beyond our budget to hold on to this Senate seat.

Let me be clear: **taking on campaign debt was the right thing to do.** But now bills are due and we still need to raise the funds to close out our 2022 race once and for all.

**I wouldn’t ask if this wasn’t important:[Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help us fill the gap? I’m hoping that I can count on your help before my team’s mid-month check-in on our debt status.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58706740/391976258/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2203-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI4OGQ5ZS04MGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RC1EFM-vLYrGmhyaTg5F6_3x6hDgqGirZn9FsaIgemg=)**
Thanks to you, Democrats preserved the majority. You only have to look as far as House Republicans’ election for Speaker to know how chaotic the Senate would be if we had lost. So truly, thank you.

_Especially_ since Republicans have the House majority, I need to continue to spend my time working for Granite Staters, not fundraising. Emails like this save me a ton of time - but only if folks like you donate. **[Will you please help out with $3 or whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58706741/391976260/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2203-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjI4OGQ5ZS04MGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RC1EFM-vLYrGmhyaTg5F6_3x6hDgqGirZn9FsaIgemg=)**

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

body:

---
| | **Will you represent grassroots Democrats and endorse President Biden’s agenda today?****[Click here to add your name →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0gVmqLBk4ptk_P_GMRx-1TaarD2lsGPb4wc_nFO4WFDiVD0gvWaVDkpUBkX5vtlyQvIJhLAZz_jPLxteWDrzPV_FBWuMvQhbpPrFJ5DsVfJDClEzvq-3KabzQWCXX9trUlaZxa1azVxrsGZDxhv5_e_1Uj4fbZ57hTUgKSPeNRDXOyMRRm9oe8GbCNUKJ3t8FSf0_snEFAI1Uw4geLpkymPrrKf5vhnYCeexVcuPOVRD4oGb9o0HWXSTFY4tztAWenPhn8_4KgG9n0KksDtRcUlLWGPz0hYcEJh82Ct-Kc-gdGNDk_OHivWDROc-mvOaflROUiAYG-tJTCd-fWfU1r2gRGbDfsyDbyjE9DN7ia5cj9ij4ERohNn9klrQxflsLboJfObsP2ND3ih12YF0Ua3Awux2r-oOSUHlPJY8d0Gbma3rEjpL8vKWnHv6gxoIocFwhWfT-_3q83dc3ZD-CmSRUGgl7VYRU1hdlqOKma4SulXi7WQCLsuwiHwjT_qpB4Ns29ZVGuDt_3EBNAt8hjc/3tp/LI3slMjNRG-6tQbBsPk2RA/h0/npvWSeFNnnFcPQMgdvySZqt6ji14nBssz-odoGP6Ink)**
* * *

name: Jason Lindsay, Pride Fund
subject: A Call to Action On 5th Anniversary of Parkland Shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dear Peter, **Today is a rallying call for action against gun violence, please read this important message. From school campus to school campus, mass shootings are becoming more and more commonplace and we must work together to push for changes in our gun laws**. Last night, it was Michigan State University, where a gunman terrorized the college campus, killing 3 students and wounding 5 others before turning the gun on himself and committing suicide. Last May, it was in Uvalde, Texas at Robb Elementary School where 19 young students and 2 teachers were killed. There have been countless incidents in between. That brings us to today, where five years ago, seventeen lives were taken away in the horrific school shooting in Parkland, Florida. Fourteen students and three staff. Fourteen kids that never had a chance to walk down the aisle for graduation. Kids that that were planning for their next chapter in college or career. Seventeen people that were loved by countless others. Seventeen that are not coming back. This is but one example of why the work we do together is so important. As we reflect on the important 5 year mark since Parkland, and the tragic events last night. We must reinforce our commitment and our work together to save lives. **Our work at Pride Fund relies solely on the generosity of our donors like yourself, we do not have any grants or corporations helping us in this work. We have accomplished a lot together.** [_**Can you chip in today with a donation of any amount, in honor of the lives we have lost to gun violence, in order to continue fueling the good work we do to end gun violence - in our elections, in the courts, grassroots advocacy, and lobbying? Any amount helps.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7bL2sWoPPuKo3gO_wObgfGb0qLzW5FpTzNGHOlLJwUk=/DgrKA4YdPq57lx8JDJ_d-HDeCsBnUa6rn0nCK-LSwsY=?refcode=2000&amount=25&recurring=yes) It is a sad state of our union, that in recent years, gun violence surpassed car accidents as the number one cause of death of our children. **Yet, even after Parkland, Uvalde and the countless mass shootings since then involving our children, Republican representatives in Congress continue to stand with the gun lobby and refuse to work on comprehensive legislation that could save lives.** "Thoughts and prayers" do nothing to save lives, but comprehensive gun-violence prevention legislation will. **Words fail, therefore action is our only solution.** With Pride Fund, we turn our thoughts into actions by pressuring lawmakers to enact commonsense measures, mobilizing our massive base of followers, and providing support to candidates and lawmakers committed to gun-violence prevention. [_**Can you please make a donation today to fund the important work we do to save lives from gun violence?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/7bL2sWoPPuKo3gO_wObgfGb0qLzW5FpTzNGHOlLJwUk=/DgrKA4YdPq57lx8JDJ_d-HDeCsBnUa6rn0nCK-LSwsY=?refcode=2000&amount=25&recurring=yes) _**We are committed to change, but we need to know that you are on board.**_ This movement is more than pushing our lawmakers to enact lifesaving legislation, but it's also about making sure our children and loved ones can live in a safer environment. Thank you, Jason Lindsay Founder and Executive Director Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7bL2sWoPPuKo3gO_wObgfGb0qLzW5FpTzNGHOlLJwUk=/DgrKA4YdPq57lx8JDJ_d-HDeCsBnUa6rn0nCK-LSwsY=?refcode=2000&amount=25&recurring=yes)
**To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?**

Not subscribed to Pride Fund's emails? **[Sign up here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/7bL2sWoPPuKo3gO_wObgfGb0qLzW5FpTzNGHOlLJwUk=/enNd78qt6GJ-dHDkkRcR8bFFHdlCmNZFwQ85otLrjrM=)**
| | Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Copyright © 2016 Pride Fund to End Gun Violence, All rights reserved.
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/7bL2sWoPPuKo3gO_wObgfGb0qLzW5FpTzNGHOlLJwUk=/P9zEkueR7_QJA0k37J2bc9AqUc_aFQXgE6AX0v1rfh0=). Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
PO Box 32377
Washington DC 20007 United States

name: Scott Walker
subject: #1 Threat to America’s Future
body:
Today, the #1 threat to America’s future is the radical leftist ideology plaguing our nation’s young people.

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdnsaedqj5ldahuheo5qfcgtv0pt59p07fgpauqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, Today, the #1 threat to America’s future is the radical leftist ideology plaguing our nation’s young people.Through indoctrination in government schools, liberal celebrity idolization, Marxist university courses, and peer pressure, young people are being DUPED into supporting an anti-American, leftist agenda. If you don’t think this is an existential threat to our nation, here’s a terrifying statistic: _young people voted for the liberal agenda in last year’s midterm elections by an**unprecedented** 2-to-1 margin._**Fellow Patriot, hope is not lost for the next generation of Americans**. Because there’s a national conservative organization breaking through to young people and helping save our country—with historic levels of success! [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a tax-deductible donation of $35 to help us reach young people and teach them conservative American values?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc9ilcg3vhbfft8gm331lp410p6g8lu9hg5umpog_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs) Young America’s Foundation (YAF) is the leading youth outreach organization of the Conservative Movement, and each year, YAF educates millions of young Americans with your conservative ideas.We’re doing what no other organization is doing—**and that’s reaching the largest audiences of young people with the best experiences in the Conservative Movement.** **A core part of how we advance your ideas is to host breakthrough campus lectures featuring conservative leaders teaching your ideas to students nationwide. **YAF’s campus lecture**** program features distinguished conservatives **Ben Shapiro** , **Matt Walsh** , **Larry Elder** , **Kellyanne Conway** , **Katie Pavlich** , Dr. **Arthur Laffer** , **Michael Knowles** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , and many others. Here’s more of how YAF promotes your ideas:
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgunncghrngo6b5j6i24gq8r4fot21gr85cho4h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs)
---
_YAF saved Ronald Reagan’s Western White House and today we use it to teach young people his ideas._
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbhi3ld94hqodin0p38deanl17ipidc896sj2to_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs)
---
_We have student volunteers on more than 2,000 campuses nationwide. YAF chapters promote your ideas_
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeqie131psamk0oa38artkdfq3oa9ireomhcfnsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs)
---
_YAF’s campus lecture program is the largest in the nation and brings your ideas to students in schools._
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ri88s23m7urh0r9r9046in0ijoo71r1br85qo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs)
---
_YAF is #1 on YouTube in the Conservative Movement—where most young people prefer to get their news--with 1 MILLION subscribers and more than 611 MILLION views._
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbjp0mh6ktku1gb1bem4d9jajfls0kl55k4lrof8_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs)
---
_YAF popularizes free enterprise and entrepreneurship for young people with the best conservative outreach programs for students seeking to learn capitalism_

| | You can see that nobody does more to promote YOUR ideas than Young America’s Foundation.This means that when you support YAF, the largest audiences of young people hear your conservative viewpoint! YAF has a time-tested approach to inspire middle school students, high school students, and college students with your freedom philosophy. Yet, Young America’s Foundation needs your support to reach as many students as possible with your conservative values! [**Fellow Patriot, the impact your tax-deductible $35 donation to YAF will have in reaching young people with your ideas is massive.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6i5uejqnpu8b9bj2v7hkbt3shv8iuvq8c5tdfhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs) Your financial support will help us reach **millions** of young Americans and rescue them from the radical, liberal ideology forced on them in classrooms.**And you will help YAF inspire students to dedicate the rest of their lives to our conservative cause and serve as steadfast conservative activists armed with the Constitution and traditional values.** Every young person we rescue from the leftist ideology is a victory against the evil Marxist forces attacking our conservative way of life. Ronald Reagan once said, _“There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.”_ If you have a child or grandchild who would benefit from becoming involved Young America’s Foundation, please call 1-800-USA-1776![**So please, don’t hesitate to give your tax-deductible $35 donation to Young America’s Foundation—the #1 youth outreach organization in America—today. You will have an incredible impact in the lives of students and young people across America.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z81dmtb370ijqo0uhln2viadv4pti3p9aoatdmcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5g61p73cph2bs) Thank you for your support.Keep Fighting for Freedom,
---
Governor Scott Walker
---
President, Young America’s Foundation
---
P.S. Do you want to reach MILLIONS of young people with your conservative ideas? You can save our country by educating millions of students with your values through the leading youth outreach organization in America! **Young America’s Foundation needs your help today to reach young people and rescue them from dangerous liberalism.**

The science is clear: **the longer we burn fossil fuels, the harder it will be to reverse the worst effects of the climate crisis.**

And, the longer we allow the fossil fuel industry to hold influence on our political system, the harder it will be to end new fossil fuel projects and hold polluters accountable.

We must enact real climate solutions to prevent further damage to our home. clean_body: We need your support – there is no off-year for climate action. | = | | | TONIGHT: OUR MID-MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE = | = Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. As we make plans and set budget priorities for this year, it’s essential that we stay on track to build the reserves we need to elect new mayors, city councilmembers, and state legislators in the coming months. That’s why I’m reaching out with an important reminder – our crucial mid-month fundraising deadline is tonight.= | = | = The science is clear: the longer we burn fossil fuels, the harder it will be to reverse the worst effects of the climate crisis. And, the longer we allow the fossil fuel industry to hold influence on our political system, the harder it will be to end new fossil fuel projects and hold polluters accountable. We must enact real climate solutions to prevent further damage to our home. That means ending new fossil fuel projects, drastically scaling up alternative energy sources, and phasing out existing fossil fuel infrastructure. There is no off-year for climate action – and we need your support. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s protect our home together, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. We remember the 17 lives lost and the communities forever impacted by gun violence in this country. When will enough be enough? **In 2022, the U.S. had more than 44,000 gun-related deaths and 648 mass shootings. Barely two months into 2023, the U.S. has more than 60 mass shootings and over 4,500 gun-related deaths.** **The most often used weapon in a mass shooting is an assault rifle. Yet researchers estimate if there was a national assault weapons ban, we’d see 70% fewer deaths in mass shootings. It’s a painfully simple solution.** President Biden has already made it clear he would follow through on his promise to restore a national assault weapons ban, combat this epidemic, and make our communities safer. Joe not only signed the most significant gun violence reduction legislation to pass Congress in 30 years. He’s issued dozens of executive orders and continues to call on Congress to take decisive action. name: Jason Crow
subject: 85 missed birthdays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Folks,

It’s been five years since we lost 17 students and educators in Parkland.

Our community knows the pain of gun violence never really goes away. For these families, that’s 85 missed birthdays and nearly 1,900 days a parent couldn’t say good morning to their kid.

These 17 victims deserve more than remembrance. They deserve action and the promise that we as a country will do better.

The students at Parkland are a brave example of what happens when you don’t stop fighting. More than 1 million Americans across the country marched to demand common-sense gun safety legislation.

We must reinvigorate that fight to end gun violence. For our children. For our communities. For our country.

Everytown for Gun Safety is leading the fight to end gun violence — one law at a time. Will you join in making a donation to help fuel their lifesaving work today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-charity-mda]

GIVE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crow-charity-mda]

Together, we will leave a better, safer world for our kids. I won’t stop fighting until we do.

In solidarity,

Jason
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States
www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [https://www.jasoncrowforcongress.com/] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com]

Senator Jon Ossoff caught the nation’s attention when he flipped one of Georgia’s U.S. Senate seats in 2021. His victory delivered the Senate majority to Democrats and made him the youngest sitting U.S. senator in the country. Now, he’s the next Senator up for re-election here in Georgia – so let’s show him some love!

**We love the way Senator Ossoff fights for access to affordable health care, voting rights, and clean energy jobs in the Senate, and we want to show him we’ve got his back!

clean_body: send a Valentine to the Peach State’s senator | | | Peter this Valentine’s Day, we want to send some love to the Peach State’s very own Senator Jon Ossoff, who is our next senator on the ballot. | = Senator Jon Ossoff caught the nation’s attention when he flipped one of Georgia’s U.S. Senate seats in 2021. His victory delivered the Senate majority to Democrats and made him the youngest sitting U.S. senator in the country. Now, he’s the next Senator up for re-election here in Georgia – so let’s show him some love! We love the way Senator Ossoff fights for access to affordable health care, voting rights, and clean energy jobs in the Senate, and we want to show him we’ve got his back! = 💗💗💗 If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = — GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.

| |
---
| | | Biden LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden's agenda and I'm not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can't do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh7q6dig7o8du32tdp5uf57qit9hmtd9jf85vslo_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i68p32c1h2bs)
---

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

name: The Gun People
subject: 4 warning signs of an infected prostate
body:
There are 4 signs to know if you’re one of them. Custom From Name: Night Peeing...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11592/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/b62b6c9940c263d7e404479b444b3723817897ca). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11592/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/b62b6c9940c263d7e404479b444b3723817897ca?message_id=ImMxMDk1ZjQwLThlZTAtMDEzYi1hZjBmLTQyMDEwYTgwMDA5Y0B0aGVndW5wZW9wbGUuY29tIg==).
---
| |
---
---
|
---
Bad news...

Millions of men over 45 have what doctors now call a “rotting prostate” – **but most have no clue about it.**

There are 4 signs to know if you’re one of them.

You might know about the first sign already: **getting up multiple times a night to pee.**

_But the other signs aren’t so obvious._

And if you have them...

You’re on the fast track to a life of catheters, doctor bills, and having ** _tiny sharp tools shoved up your pecker._**

The [Free Report you’ll see on the next page](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11592/6374453/7f70d80089a3dcdaeef7e46f6d7c38369bdf06d2/b62b6c9940c263d7e404479b444b3723817897ca) will tell you if all that is in your future or not.

It’ll also tell you the easiest way to turn things around – before it’s too late.

So if you’ve got warning sign #1... peeing all the time... especially at night.

[I wouldn’t ignore this.](https://links.thegunpeople.com/a/1537/click/11592/6374453/7f70d80089a3dcdaeef7e46f6d7c38369bdf06d2/b62b6c9940c263d7e404479b444b3723817897ca)

name: Team Evergreen
subject: A Valentine's poem for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Roses are red, violets are blue...
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4427?t=2&akid=13288%2E53494%2EPJHzqy)
---
🌹Roses are red,
💙 Violets are blue,
🤢 ExxonMobil made $100,000 per minute in 2022.
---
| [END CORPORATE PRICE GOUGING](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4427?t=3&akid=13288%2E53494%2EPJHzqy)
---
Friend,
Big Oil spent last year war profiteering. They gouged Americans with high gas prices and attempted to lock the country into decades of new fossil fuel leases—using Putin's invasion of Ukraine as cover. And they made out like bandits. ExxonMobil just announced earning a whopping $56 billion in profits in 2022—more than $100,000 per minute. Chevron isn't far behind, making $36 billion last year alone.
**These profits directly line the pockets of company executives and shareholders while coming at a massive cost to consumers and our climate. That must end.**
[_**Sign your name to join us and a coalition of progressive organizations to demand Congress pass a windfall profits tax and rein in excessive corporate profits!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4427?t=4&akid=13288%2E53494%2EPJHzqy)
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4427?t=5&akid=13288%2E53494%2EPJHzqy)
---
We can see right through the Big Polluter playbook: Price gouge consumers, pay off legislators, and blame and attack clean energy policy.
With the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act, we're turning the tables. As more Americans access the benefits of electrification and clean energy, more and more people are realizing that clean energy is cheaper and more reliable.
[_**But we can't let Big Polluters keep ripping off working families in the meantime. Congress must pass a windfall tax and shut down price gouging—sign your name now!**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4427?t=6&akid=13288%2E53494%2EPJHzqy)
[SIGN ON](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4427?t=7&akid=13288%2E53494%2EPJHzqy)
---
Onward,
Team Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=13288%2E53494%2EPJHzqy). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

| _**President Biden just called on Congress to defend democracy in his State of the Union address >> **_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58710128/391988806/1329634875?refcode=em_fr_021423_b1_biden_30ac&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDMxMjYwNS04OWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mLhsi7N2nG1Ugin5D_OE8ui_cjemxzOaLcNnyzcxKA=) The GOP is engaged in an all-out war on voting rights. name: PA Democrats
subject: A spotlight on Congresswoman Summer Lee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
We are particularly honored to shine a spotlight on the remarkable Congresswoman Summer Lee (CD12), who is a true leader and pioneer in so many ways. | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, As we celebrate Black History Month, we take this opportunity to recognize and honor the achievements of Black Americans who have made an indelible impact on our nation and our commonwealth. **We are particularly honored to shine a spotlight on the remarkable Congresswoman Summer Lee (CD12), who is a true leader and pioneer in so many ways.**
---
---
Congresswoman Lee was raised in North Braddock and Swissvale before graduating from Penn State and Howard University School of Law. She has been a tireless champion for workers' rights, fair wages, and the right to organize. Her efforts as a grassroots organizer brought attention to important issues such as the minimum wage, voter turnout, and the prevention of police violence against local students. **Her commitment to justice and her community was recognized in 2018 when she made Pennsylvania history by becoming the first Black woman from Western Pennsylvania ever elected to the legislature. ** As a state legislator, she brought millions of dollars in funding back to her district for community revitalization and infrastructure upgrades. Congresswoman Lee's leadership extends beyond her community, as she is also a champion of environmental justice. In November, Summer’s historic election to become the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in the US Congress is a testament to her unwavering dedication to her constituents and her commitment to making a difference. **It is our privilege to have Congresswoman Lee representing Pennsylvania in the United States Congress. Her achievements are a source of inspiration for us all, and we are proud to celebrate her contributions to our nation and our state.** Please follow Congresswoman Lee on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58710269/391989100/-364423778?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRhSG7LnMLj5MiaSlUWPHdOv9eqIlmJFOVCH7dDozx4=&emci=d79ca65e-7dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f66205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296), [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58710271/391989109/-887202720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRhSG7LnMLj5MiaSlUWPHdOv9eqIlmJFOVCH7dDozx4=&emci=d79ca65e-7dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f66205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296) or [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58710273/391989111/1533025887?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjYyMDVmZi04OGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bRhSG7LnMLj5MiaSlUWPHdOv9eqIlmJFOVCH7dDozx4=&emci=d79ca65e-7dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f66205ff-88ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296) to keep up with her important work, and join us in honoring the achievements of Black Americans during this Black History Month and always. With the utmost respect and admiration, Pennsylvania Democrats

body:
and fight back against Republican attacks

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730549/392035078/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjA3OGYwOC1iM2FjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-QADNOP7X_Rf0EhvcEu5W3bYLm3mR0-kDo_XaNrEhY=&emci=8835d265-a4ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4f078f08-b3ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Republicans in the Virginia General Assembly have big plans – they want to roll back commonsense gun control and ban abortion after just 15 weeks of pregnancy. Right now, the only thing standing in their way is our Democratic majority in the Virginia Senate. But control of the General Assembly is on the ballot this year, and with it, the future of gun safety, voting rights, reproductive freedom, and more. That’s why Senator Warner is busy helping elect Democrats in key districts around Virginia. _[**Can you make a contribution toward our mid-month goal? Any amount supports Mark’s work to take back the House of Delegates and expand our majority in the Virginia Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730550/392035079/-1347152690?refcode=mw_em_230214_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjA3OGYwOC1iM2FjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-QADNOP7X_Rf0EhvcEu5W3bYLm3mR0-kDo_XaNrEhY=)_ In the U.S. Senate, Senator Warner is fighting every day for Virginians – working to help low-income families access child care, increase access to affordable housing, and lower drug costs for life-saving medications. But expanding our Democratic majority in the General Assembly is key to making sure Virginia Republicans don’t roll back our progress at the state level. As a former Governor and Virginia’s voice in the Senate, this fight is personal for Mark Warner. He’s going to be hitting the road this year to make sure we turn out voters across the Commonwealth and win this November. _[**Our mid-month deadline is tomorrow at midnight and we need your support more than ever. Can we count on you to contribute $5 to help us elect legislators that will protect our people in the Commonwealth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730551/392035080/-1347152690?refcode=mw_em_230214_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjA3OGYwOC1iM2FjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-QADNOP7X_Rf0EhvcEu5W3bYLm3mR0-kDo_XaNrEhY=)_ Thank you, Team Warner **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730552/392035081/-1347152690?refcode=mw_em_230214_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjA3OGYwOC1iM2FjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q-QADNOP7X_Rf0EhvcEu5W3bYLm3mR0-kDo_XaNrEhY=)**

clean_body: and fight back against Republican attacks | | | Derek, Republicans in the Virginia General Assembly have big plans – they want to roll back commonsense gun control and ban abortion after just 15 weeks of pregnancy. Right now, the only thing standing in their way is our Democratic majority in the Virginia Senate. But control of the General Assembly is on the ballot this year, and with it, the future of gun safety, voting rights, reproductive freedom, and more. That’s why Senator Warner is busy helping elect Democrats in key districts around Virginia. = In the U.S. Senate, Senator Warner is fighting every day for Virginians – working to help low-income families access child care, increase access to affordable housing, and lower drug costs for life-saving medications. But expanding our Democratic majority in the General Assembly is key to making sure Virginia Republicans don’t roll back our progress at the state level. As a former Governor and Virginia’s voice in the Senate, this fight is personal for Mark Warner. He’s going to be hitting the road this year to make sure we turn out voters across the Commonwealth and win this November. = Thank you, Team Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:

name: Candace Owens
subject: The dark side of Black History Month
body:
The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd9c6ee18e9b451a91cf83f1722d6207&_e=ueRawjuZcQ2fWYpm41SdYWHAp_5A5qHlN0UF_Khv-OKk33rdAoFwT7ckumwlH27sDuxeTci8Zim7HUAzpGkoFuLQ-LiH_KnheL8x-DmfzuuqAm_cO-_YU3903J51ULq51GtrxhOibcHuZebO1ReF4YQB-OFmoU6Rz7j2BxQ3RccHvjwu8WjDJGBKH3ZryUIxkLygsPxAwb5bicBgEM4ofRGcpdY3M8LvBNXfXd7bKQhxtFnw1qs-EEhj-uux4Te5CE05whQb18nKFMurJpWqsnbxYTinIwNftkGI5dNyMT8%3D)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd9c6ee18e9b451a91cf83f1722d6207&_e=ueRawjuZcQ2fWYpm41SdYWHAp_5A5qHlN0UF_Khv-OKk33rdAoFwT7ckumwlH27sDuxeTci8Zim7HUAzpGkoFuLQ-LiH_KnheL8x-DmfzuuqAm_cO-_YU3903J51ULq51GtrxhOibcHuZebO1ReF4VTufdLkI16PZGdEVvjTK5seumtahs1wkywcijc6Lbo6HzfmFDhY3yTkV8h3NSHOa-NAKg1-AyzjecvQFw100cWQC6IeUPzldXKhK52ar1Sc7xxMUxedcVm-9CxzY1MKV_VJTTDGcTm6mj9BNX46cGw%3D)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd9c6ee18e9b451a91cf83f1722d6207&_e=ueRawjuZcQ2fWYpm41SdYWHAp_5A5qHlN0UF_Khv-OKk33rdAoFwT7ckumwlH27sDuxeTci8Zim7HUAzpGkoFuLQ-LiH_KnheL8x-DmfzuuqAm_cO-_YU3903J51ULq51GtrxhOibcHuZebO1ReF4TV4hv_jYUtKMQJBmqo4URuvvrGf8dSYQQQdzLSrgCLvMfkHZ96FQa5kc067hAzlY5ZkaPGHc8MIl0MMDnxYwCu2ykrW9cAkVc6I0zasqXQBejTzl23NHCWWNRohwfF8krWAWD33jXYEKhdQIc_0oWk%3D)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd9c6ee18e9b451a91cf83f1722d6207&_e=ueRawjuZcQ2fWYpm41SdYWHAp_5A5qHlN0UF_Khv-OKk33rdAoFwT7ckumwlH27sDuxeTci8Zim7HUAzpGkoFuLQ-LiH_KnheL8x-DmfzuuqAm_cO-_YU3903J51ULq5XWx3Tl29u-HeBropbL6xCcQcjYUyJXbcQ3EYTb9ZW0lG0a7XdtF51KHgyJlkws2ixc1OQEANOI4IcM3xtmYzzI3_NcXyBlvv2hAl1ugR0kcARIK-iZQG11sqXNW_T5-WCvEb7lfxkn6NN1-1cLjPk3spLFqdAlQD60m-uExIPt0%3D)

name: Tom Cotton

body:
Reinstate those who were FIRED by Biden’s COVID vaccine mandate| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1177ae400650450a93ee146786dc6209&_e=KtFxogHMUm13YSGHt2ugDASzsABHuZ6zM2y_QumUmnOcBrRZJhUM40ztiTSkTUW7_cOxWiA2atkj-wGp5oC8kKVuLWVGjHozWiXaKxuiBsGmdcudOIDb_97oY0N3ow0icX-H9eKJeIEBZjvmy1_ABUbJiXUZ8y4Dl2t0KVc0P1TvpmhIrVsZdWa0lmzm67sumu_Y8QFdu9oWvlT19CvnPkC6uTtUZH_xq2dG4sA0KCUL7lOzKELr_UUIEuAW391PPMN7-_VnYneRZmzs3HdJLSm6LxeldoPDBc0uAehMZUVGhhwE4dfuJYay4VeCw_0Cm2ekOjeq9VBlOmyNjVSqGw5TnmXdIZcYUTqePsKyiXMmLCpov2uKjG0cTdXI4gxggNN5cUgTW5WsiU_9WsMMj5A_-fDUHkIeliNyTf7hmlXG2UyqtJptTK7otCaTDfklMbr_YBlv8HmuseTVdaQ-Cg%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,
---
Joe Biden discharged thousands of American troops who refused a COVID vaccine that doesn’t prevent COVID... at a time when our military is dealing with a recruitment crisis. It’s disgraceful, but Senate Republicans refused to turn our backs on our troops. name: Candace Owens
subject: The ugly truth about Black History Month
body:
It’s Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas — but have never read any of his works.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z16q77kuoc79pdfobjdv4k0c0q6g5k7pjokg9fg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)

Friend,

It's Black History Month. . . The month when a bunch of people who know nothing about black history take the time to celebrate people like Frederick Douglas -- but have never read any of his works.

Black History Month isn't about celebrating the Black men and women who've changed the world for the better.

It's nothing more than a way for woke radicals to push identity politics and glorify division in America.

I don't want a Black History Month, and I can't say "why" better than Morgan Freeman did:

_" You're going to relegate my history to a month? **Black history is American history.** "_

My name is Candace Owens, and I am a co-founder of the BLEXIT Foundation. One of the reasons I helped found BLEXIT was to teach REAL history to Black and minority communities.

To teach true American history -- _and not the socialist, woke version that 's pushed today_ -- I've set a goal to raise $50,000 this month.

[_**Will you join me in the push for TRUE history, Friend, by sending a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmif0fbseffla4v5cbu0d2ov94nfhlsco45m01v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)

BLEXIT honors independent black voices like. . .

. . . Thomas Sowell, a well-known American conservative and is considered one of the most influential black conservatives who has authored over 40 books.

. . . Clarence Thomas, a Constitutional originalist and Associate Justice of the Supreme Court of the United States.

. . . Walter Williams, an American economist, commentator, author, and academic and former John M. Olin Distinguished Professor of Economics at George Mason University.

That's why I hope you'll join me in our effort to celebrate Black Excellence and work to build a better future for Black and minority communities. [_**Click here to send a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zum1r71egi799m947eb0lmdl2ck4prosmotjka8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)

Here's how we're reaching Black and minority communities with American history:

**BLEXIT 's Liberation Camps** provide an American History curriculum to children in Kindergarten through 8th grade who live in low-income communities. We also teach key life skills and character development.

The children experience 18 weeks of after-school programming, six weeks of full-day summer camp programming, 25 full-day programs when schools had in-service days, and 20 parents-night-out programs and field trips.

**And through our 43 State Chapters made up of more than 14,000 volunteers! **

Our chapter members bring BLEXIT's five pillars to life through events and outreach efforts to places where no other organizations can effectively reach to combat the victimhood mentality.
1. **Advocating** for School Choice.
2. **Promoting** criminal justice reform by developing positive relationships between police and minority communities.
3. **Championing** entrepreneurship and free enterprise.
4. **Developing** history programs that will inspire minority children.

Presenting the message of BLEXIT through art and live experiences.

BLEXIT State Chapter members work within their local communities to help change the narrative that surrounds America's minority communities.

Friend, can you help us reach our goal of raising $50,000 this month? **Click below to send your support.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuekf0pl1qk5seeaqlnqs2afig0fumese73886r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6aqva9c2a3k37o74sdob4q9noareu67negd26vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq30gat8ak46vcsvbd2qmc94h2lk8f374l62e3hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf1038raf8jcthhtvm693h7q0a4bn4837b16bj10_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrbds1qbsp43ngt2jnct7n1kcmjj8rj75ionrqbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd5s27cp6e94okfbrkepefu0kebpl235chj9pn3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc2ihbcphpfd9bh2o0f1ell9d55d6g5aa5t07d28_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9a0tj9gftg3hftau5amncijmetr03c1jv1p2p50_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpjpiro4smnflv298clrmm06s8h1uo28rifgl87o_rp22sh2s8i66pr3c5i64oj7cth2bs)

Thank you,

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

_BLEXIT is a 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent provided by law._
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2z4tr306kg5kshu0k60c1knsu36cbui9lhdr9uc7o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpbu2rvpj2hkd3tq7pspp3ispdq9m9q4acqtuhd0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cdgm8oj2ctjm49fg)

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5gOujJU4G2FQlGZnk4uqA0WItqqJyJPc6AGRosYvZFvRWObURIgojeEif31WJu0uvEO2c_5tvT_mesmBhsIiqW4xF76b7FLUXRG43uCimX1hVjUpyvH6sisX-vF2wp-_ZY_oBTJSSDNom3ynNW9149ExyicQ3hS81HyMLuP9ZojOlV72J5TJ19HSmGorMjPmcewlt0MXMRb76WfOlmQPZfp1-VcWpOeCPG2lj_f5ihVQqc4RqiN9YcvsgRSlioWQXEM1xWkep6VA-sT5dTw-ySQ0E2I-rV4q4YGl79qO6Frcstnm6HeS7zIl3jDdBES2WuxFel0_vvHFhUP6u6LaqSFVS9XIa_2Mf6hQ2cyl-kAtaBdIUyAGSZ7s1qqxc4FYZfT5LcVks0diKqV3lIlctDzPwRbRN4n0VHteLBMXang/3tp/KmrVRBm3T3CYZHy6AHOteg/h0/VIsv1x37v7ClRtsdELnRwP8fAsm-chEQgEbjLAJP8gU)
---
Peter, We have some new developments on the George Santos scandal. **First:** news broke that Santos is officially under investigation by the House Ethics committee for campaign finance violations and for revelations that lied about his upbringing, education, and work history. **Then:** Kevin McCarthy declined to block George Santos from receiving classified briefings, despite bipartisan calls for him to do so. **Last week:** Eric joined three Democratic colleagues in introducing a resolution to formally expel Santos from Congress.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDufi9jXMpwhJXJz_xFCene7eZMGeXgg8cRxB_m22rqz04RDaY25F6ldjjQVPLCuWnxWnd01RjGmoS77yjapZGvhB8y72zbzcMNgJCVTTuY9upRtdiNOO5YK9KclDnH6emAhDuujRQztC89zj07Dq22xMRwgoAPss6ohqcJ9Z7ibxe9z2WURjl6vUR7jZAkwuXXIdlW9KONlsaNfxf97UYTXp6A9cfla0rXYxIXmoCmS-VNp6w6TISWxNebjOnVXn3DzMabxmR-ZGQHl7-1QCMnAQ/3tp/KmrVRBm3T3CYZHy6AHOteg/h1/1iQ9b9dVIyx5r0PmUukkc6ym-olS88rGyG-TUgtMsvc)
---
_Introducing the resolution to expel Santos from Congress (photo via Axios)_
---
The pressure is mounting on Santos to either resign or be expelled from Congress, but we need to continue showing public support to put an end to Santos' political career. **[If you haven't yet, add your name to our nationwide petition calling on House Republicans to expel George Santos from Congress.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDufi9jXMpwhJXJz_xFCene7eZMGeXgg8cRxB_m22rqz04RDaY25F6ldjjQVPLCuWnxWnd01RjGmoS77yjapZGvhIriojdNHmtJX3UWi7zoq8PGkYXQuZ325DLdh_4PcIwDfxnwJLYA5SyXQ02Gf5sX2AryuGL2Ey-oo_-YjYKJnjItu0U8F0nPvnFmxRHc6KM3D2F8e0rBkIPqJiOoVw5fUvP7cHE7gDLgycQFauAcGxys6i7azs1y-QhPeNiGyu4QX1_P87Tk2ZqiAwVBclo1XQ/3tp/KmrVRBm3T3CYZHy6AHOteg/h2/hWEYr1_OcU5oNCWtEDQZv9BDB31DC4VvtXswY44Nwsw)**
---
[ **Santos must go. Add your name.** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDufi9jXMpwhJXJz_xFCene7eZMGeXgg8cRxB_m22rqz04RDaY25F6ldjjQVPLCuWnxWnd01RjGmoS77yjapZGvhOtNia9BXuGgrbBfvJhd9pIUuen2XivyyFK6JZtEEVbrJgsi4ozJCzJ8ks7lWhpFGl8Rlq74L6IVGMk89BxbvEQbE57fagiBgx4BqDT_1gBUdhIPuaKsCDkr9FBeFUVOEsZd_RvzPwzMrn4fi5wD6jOWS_Wjwe67WNZVoOnaCLQR7eHNf02u_zRrBmxuqpNUSg/3tp/KmrVRBm3T3CYZHy6AHOteg/h3/Dz5QWWroTk7Kkj1g14KFf92FHhtm47c53gdErYfqdzo)
---
In the last week alone, new reports emerged that Santos was arrested in Pennsylvania for writing hot checks to Amish dog breeders. He's also been accused of sexual harassment by a former staffer. Does this sound like the behavior of someone fit for office? Let's not forget that he still holds meaningful power as a voting Member of Congress. He can't be trusted with sensitive information, let alone have a say in how taxpayer dollars are spent. Santos is a pathological liar and a disgrace to this institution -- that’s why Eric is leading the charge for his expulsion. **[Will you join Eric’s calls to expel George Santos from Congress>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDufi9jXMpwhJXJz_xFCene7eZMGeXgg8cRxB_m22rqz04RDaY25F6ldjjQVPLCuWnxWnd01RjGmoS77yjapZGvhAXOH0S3P1ngvu-L8_cHWeFA1ReszR46nqs2b--uCglvSiRkpiKJMpTJazAGwDzTQViZ-Sdqr1jzZKtNCI1pYbYRzgOu9zV2sSuhQO1DEbPvWpg6KsCf8PjIkFFUBpEVGBLwGbY4LSl329O1AAwrMQm1nJbjty33zjmLhDJ3MFg5vN5h3FuopOxUBWB3BgZOKQ/3tp/KmrVRBm3T3CYZHy6AHOteg/h4/HfqLghlPBU4zYZf2yoj1hTrLmz-sHCiso7LwfH9yIMM)** Thank you, Team Sorensen

clean_body: | | Peter, We have some new developments on the George Santos scandal. First: news broke that Santos is officially under investigation by the House Ethics committee for campaign finance violations and for revelations that lied about his upbringing, education, and work history. Then: Kevin McCarthy declined to block George Santos from receiving classified briefings, despite bipartisan calls for him to do so. Last week: Eric joined three Democratic colleagues in introducing a resolution to formally expel Santos from Congress. | Introducing the resolution to expel Santos from Congress (photo via Axios) The pressure is mounting on Santos to either resign or be expelled from Congress, but we need to continue showing public support to put an end to Santos' political career. In the last week alone, new reports emerged that Santos was arrested in Pennsylvania for writing hot checks to Amish dog breeders. He's also been accused of sexual harassment by a former staffer. Does this sound like the behavior of someone fit for office? Let's not forget that he still holds meaningful power as a voting Member of Congress. He can't be trusted with sensitive information, let alone have a say in how taxpayer dollars are spent. Santos is a pathological liar and a disgrace to this institution -- that’s why Eric is leading the charge for his expulsion. Thank you, Team Sorensen | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58712213/391996572/390144955?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230214_1_1&refcode2=89d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=Svrxof5JFQg+jK5e3+FiVReo7XCS/ZgOVq3PWMnun7vCc5yDXFudTFk7kEr4Q/CqFfzrdIeS5zjXTrZUvtZlzA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5ZDZiNTljLThkYWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wp344OQ7ic-5v3A1oGMVXdm_zndWTVmUl0LT9bIreBw=)

America is in crisis, Peter.

Last night, on the eve of the fifth anniversary of the Parkland school shooting, we got news of yet another mass shooting, this time on the Michigan State University campus.

There are so many mass shootings in our country that it is far too easy to become numb to them, to shut out the pain that so many families face. And it's not just mass shootings. **On average, more than 100 Americans are killed with guns every single day.**

[We need action. I’m asking that you join President Biden in calling for Congress to BAN assault weapons. Sign on now:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58712214/391996573/-166758528?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230214_1_1&refcode2=89d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=Svrxof5JFQg+jK5e3+FiVReo7XCS/ZgOVq3PWMnun7vCc5yDXFudTFk7kEr4Q/CqFfzrdIeS5zjXTrZUvtZlzA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5ZDZiNTljLThkYWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wp344OQ7ic-5v3A1oGMVXdm_zndWTVmUl0LT9bIreBw=&emci=86d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=89d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)
| | [BAN ASSAULT WEAPONS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58712215/391996574/-166758528?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230214_1_1&refcode2=89d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=Svrxof5JFQg+jK5e3+FiVReo7XCS/ZgOVq3PWMnun7vCc5yDXFudTFk7kEr4Q/CqFfzrdIeS5zjXTrZUvtZlzA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5ZDZiNTljLThkYWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wp344OQ7ic-5v3A1oGMVXdm_zndWTVmUl0LT9bIreBw=&emci=86d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=89d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)

At Democrats Serve, we recruit, support, and train the public service professionals who experience first-hand the impacts of our gun violence crisis — from the teachers whose lives are endangered in school shootings to the first responders who walk into homes where gun violence has just happened to the counselors who help families cope with the aftermath.

We must not become numb. We must work together to keep our communities safe from gun violence.

[Let’s start by reinstating the Assault Weapons Ban that would eliminate the weapons of war that were used at Parkland, Uvalde, and too many other mass shootings to count.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58712216/391996575/-166758528?source=DS_EM_PT_LO_230214_1_1&refcode2=89d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&contactdata=Svrxof5JFQg+jK5e3+FiVReo7XCS/ZgOVq3PWMnun7vCc5yDXFudTFk7kEr4Q/CqFfzrdIeS5zjXTrZUvtZlzA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg5ZDZiNTljLThkYWMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wp344OQ7ic-5v3A1oGMVXdm_zndWTVmUl0LT9bIreBw=&emci=86d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=89d6b59c-8dac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=10067282)

Thank you for joining the call,

Brett Broesder

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78963%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=47K6Jc8EQGkwlIJt35REsA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78964%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6e5oAaEJ1gUbRvuM3%2fCE0Q&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78963%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=47K6Jc8EQGkwlIJt35REsA&sysid=1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78975%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F4BrKnrEs3tzNCaZ%2fUrvKg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78963%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=47K6Jc8EQGkwlIJt35REsA&sysid=1)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know \-- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78976%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=on1wjiaVSoolTxJ%2fdWZ%2bJw&sysid=1) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78977%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H90ScixhEohJxvMihRZ7TA&sysid=1)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78978%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0yQMbijnxo6D%2f2LwxNpg0g&sysid=1) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

clean_body: | | | = This Valentine's Day, let's spread the love — and support some of our powerhouse US Senators up for re-election in 2024. = = Ohio's Sherrod Brown , Nevada's Jacky Rosen , Pennsylvania's Bob Casey , Wisconsin's Tammy Baldwin , and Montana's Jon Tester have what it takes to win in 2024—but they can only do it with your help. = = = It's going to be a tough, uphill battle in these swing states. But with all of us pitching in, we can get it done. There's so much at stake. We have to do more than just wear our hearts on our sleeves. = Wouldn't that be the best Valentine's Day gift? Onward! Jeff = | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: this is next-level
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
I've got to be honest with you, Team

Team, I’ve talked before about how one of the reasons I ran for Congress was to protect our democracy from the threat of right-wing extremism. But I’ve got to be honest — seeing that extremism up close and personal has been pretty alarming. I was on the House floor when Marjorie Taylor Greene and other Republicans heckled President Biden for saying the GOP wants to cut Social Security — something they’ve repeatedly threatened to do. I’ve heard awful attacks against LGBTQ+ Americans. And I’ve seen them passionately speak about their agenda to block abortion access. **Team, as a representative for Colorado, I promise you that I will continue to fight back against extremism. And I’ll defend our democracy, just as the people of our community sent me to Washington to do — but I can’t do it alone.** **[Our mid-month fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and the truth is, online donations have been slower than expected in 2023 — so we need some help to catch up to our goal.
