name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.

| |
---
| | | Biden just LIED to you and working class patriots everywhere about the state of our nation.
* The Chinese are brazenly flying spy balloons over our country
* The border remains open and the wall remains unfinished.
* Illegal border crossings are at an all time high and Fentanyl is pouring into our country by the metric ton.
* Inflation is skyrocketing and people are struggling to feed their families.

Having sat three feet away as Biden spouted his lies, I am more motivated than ever to STOP Biden’s agenda and I’m not waiting a minute longer to start and neither should you.

Right now, the liberal media is spinning this speech as a major success for Joe and the Democrats and they will raise MILLIONS before the day is over so they can continue running this country into the ground.

As Speaker of the House, I am standing against Joe Biden and the Democrats but I can’t do this alone. If his speech sickened you like it sickened me, I need you stand with me to save our great nation.

---
| | [STAND WITH HOUSE REPUBLICANS](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=02d8773cef45475c87d7b88b7ff582e7&_e=RjMOH-89udBcpXPTpafWZVTC0gkuE88eME69uU62LZ_fvI1isTcT88Vye_FdrRovYyTXj7Y0Dk-4jSdAnZgecMCkEdJy97eM0x163Hce_Emo86NNyEnxVKDzoq6e730qgp78iGs2nI-wLv1um4u6eHotlOVQXfJ22-NcNla8QpGA7skLr3CbiTXs5H49feqfYaVHGq8_M2H8mUqJHj9jpL9leJGqwWY2cqR0ctzI4-8uwiCeSphzEOgKmcw7_vQtt7-B1caDsAoVDcmTo2Ex6vPgo01xR3WcDl65MzK-eusS0w5Hn9JZ0gs6fgESjxrO-4EKvoG8-aROxnkRoDLndXaDLrvPURK13fJ3Wm4rhKmQU9_DHbEVaR8aeNFgLQYMWCxj0YBN86RRQlIkRz8O1ksyrBxfShYSITycUZOfyJbtwR1uQaGMyEwqsc7dlKKOQW8G3CDCh-SdbheVodmVdQ%3D%3D)

Kevin McCarthy

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=907ff2640be14c2d98a9189e2b3eb96b&_e=VeiuAhTifZfBl5XnrwpjHx8n0MYxymtOXcpOHvXFIV71M9Pq11Bmr_t4nGz0S73kzHy08qMHQ23aIA7oR7l2BNyi-zMjeM8G3220tJwfZ-42jYyyUmEDZe2eKFBj04BS-z-ffIhr7MGZnAATr--cJM7BMoHPjZKYJf_XaNbzWNFlyyv1NfaVNhZKB9dojPy_EUPBph_0LN_A3AmRpofu3PzoaMWthDpYNDV-cxbE9xauYoqMtr0sCvKzhXjTK5RN1_wcegdlRfJhDJzBRTtQqkO5KoafXV03ji5PdA3LxJ-ZetSSE8oiQChEI7se8yXDzNq6spFdcxuRDPbp4WialOMi0qmaw-1jxWMb895R3nklvRCGyp3xg2cOV_MXJuAHT17OrWzp1kws4vLjiz4559ZPOZo8hSneA_Ud7qTMh4LfvkkNBKbXny_ZpRQt8H0J)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=907ff2640be14c2d98a9189e2b3eb96b&_e=VeiuAhTifZfBl5XnrwpjHx8n0MYxymtOXcpOHvXFIV71M9Pq11Bmr_t4nGz0S73kzHy08qMHQ23aIA7oR7l2BNyi-zMjeM8G3220tJwfZ-42jYyyUmEDZe2eKFBj04BS-z-ffIhr7MGZnAATr--cJM7BMoHPjZKYJf_XaNbzWNFlyyv1NfaVNhZKB9dojPy_EUPBph_0LN_A3AmRpofu3PzoaMWthDpYNDV-cxbE9xauYoqMtr0sCvKzhXjTK5RN1_wcegdlRfJhDJzBRTtQqr1IEfleydN6WS7tjjrRdmIbcb2nhKBp_7_f_3lCNphqmMMyGj0WHLxX3-7KYEjRmd8WA8zskiPRoa482HPJStWZoyeHLW1-4mz6npPXZ1zdh6WsSS4iKCBGcMZBayn87j0LH3uOtSl6lRHXavO1GcWPaqoy8U4ytj4MWpuGHgnD)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=907ff2640be14c2d98a9189e2b3eb96b&_e=VeiuAhTifZfBl5XnrwpjHx8n0MYxymtOXcpOHvXFIV71M9Pq11Bmr_t4nGz0S73kzHy08qMHQ23aIA7oR7l2BNyi-zMjeM8G3220tJwfZ-42jYyyUmEDZe2eKFBj04BS-z-ffIhr7MGZnAATr--cJM7BMoHPjZKYJf_XaNbzWNFlyyv1NfaVNhZKB9dojPy_EUPBph_0LN_A3AmRpofu3PzoaMWthDpYNDV-cxbE9xauYoqMtr0sCvKzhXjTK5RN1_wcegdlRfJhDJzBRTtQqj9_G_-RBPYLLmxlGhkN3Hba-tsKOKWIw6eILJqaXgO1fTgb9o5hGDQREjFEpy-xo2DijqtYQql9a00VITe804a6qKzRQj6E5m45-si55Crhw2vnp0-wUnQtaDhc2_Kb3kFQ1N3VFG0wc6-WSPyvkQk8DWExHfeOfCdPE4xOa3XL)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=907ff2640be14c2d98a9189e2b3eb96b&_e=VeiuAhTifZfBl5XnrwpjHx8n0MYxymtOXcpOHvXFIV71M9Pq11Bmr_t4nGz0S73kzHy08qMHQ23aIA7oR7l2BNyi-zMjeM8G3220tJwfZ-42jYyyUmEDZe2eKFBj04BS-z-ffIhr7MGZnAATr--cJM7BMoHPjZKYJf_XaNbzWNFlyyv1NfaVNhZKB9dojPy_EUPBph_0LN_A3AmRpofu3PzoaMWthDpYNDV-cxbE9xauYoqMtr0sCvKzhXjTK5RN1_wcegdlRfJhDJzBRTtQqvRGNbD43NeXp-X2Ay3tfqwxq_w3r2YAM15mkejpPywz72yrBk1j00f8sgKlu5n9hM7npLD0NEvoQbkYSAJRsjLPDxErddWM5sVLDASIfgqxOsD2hfXgAwetqH43r5aOZEQWWs1EeDt2W9paD9eo59STqW3ocN-NS0Ls3JQiS03M).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

body:

| Peter,

It’s Whitney, Abigail’s Finance Director. February is the shortest fundraising month of the year, which means my team and I are working overtime to ensure we raise enough to hit our fundraising goal.

The groundwork we lay now will have a substantial impact on the success of our campaign moving forward. [_**We’re already halfway to our February fundraising deadline – will you invest in our campaign right away?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58729980/392033609/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230214-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRmY2UyMTgtYjFhYy1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uR4B_D-3gaYAyCOvFUCqAYYxZpdLoAFO0aZfEBmj1EE=)

| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58729981/392033610/1394218500?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230214-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRmY2UyMTgtYjFhYy1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uR4B_D-3gaYAyCOvFUCqAYYxZpdLoAFO0aZfEBmj1EE=)
---
One thing we can continue to count on cycle to cycle is that races in VA-07 will be incredibly close. And as we work to reclaim the House majority, defending Abigail’s seat is crucial.

She has been and will continue to be our unwavering advocate in Congress, and the support we build for our campaign will ensure she can continue her important work for many cycles to come.

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Nancy Pelosi and Sean Patrick Maloney are not the future of the Democratic Party.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Unfortunately, we’re not surprised by Nancy Pelosi's push for Sean Patrick
Maloney to become Labor Secretary:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126981?refcode=em20230214-27541&t=1001&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ ]Salon: Critics decry Pelosi push for 'corporate hack' Sean Patrick
Maloney to be labor secretary
Sean Patrick Maloney was the chair of DCCC last cycle which is built to
protect entrenched incumbents from progressive primary challengers. He was
a member of the New Democrats in Congress — a corporation-friendly caucus.

Nancy Pelosi and Sean Patrick Maloney are not the future of the Democratic
Party. They are corporate-backed entrenched members of the old guard of
the Party.

I need your help to continue to build progressive power and push the
Democratic Party forward by electing more champions like AOC and Cori
Bush. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126981?refcode=em20230214-27541&t=1002&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ ]Will you contribute $3 to help us recruit the next
slate of candidates for the 2024 election cycle?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126981?refcode=em20230214-27541&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ ]Contribute $3

Big corporations almost always want to protect the way things are, while
working-class families who are struggling to get by are the ones who
desperately need change.

We know that 2024 sounds like it’s far away but when you’re going up
against a machine that protects entrenched incumbents, we have to start
early in order to win primary elections. AOC won in 2018. Cori Bush and
Jamaal Bowman won in 2020. Summer Lee just won in 2022.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126981?refcode=em20230214-27541&t=1022&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ ]We can win again in 2024, but with our own fundraising on the decline,
we need your support today,
Peter. Please make your best
gift right now to help us continue our work.

No matter what — whether you can contribute or need to pass on chipping in
today — we’re so thankful that you’re a part of our movement for progress.

In solidarity always,

Alexandra Rojas

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230214-27541-footer&t=1025&refcode2=27541_1203867_vpJWDQ&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=27541%2E1203867%2EvpJWDQ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| | | **BREAKING via MSNBC: Top Republican _doubles down_ on plan to sunset Social Security and Medicare!**

**We must fight back:**
**[Add your name to our Democratic petition to stand with President Biden in his fight to protect Social Security and Medicare from House Republicans >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12080?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230214-NewsAlert-SocialSecurityDoubleDown-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230214-NewsAlert-SocialSecurityDoubleDown-ETG-sl1&akid=9816%2E9716520%2EndAIen)**

---

Team, Republican leaders are _continuing_ to push their plan to automatically sunset legislation like Social Security and Medicare every five years!

Right now, **65 million American seniors** rely on Social Security and Medicare benefits they _earned_ through decades of hard work -- but under this GOP plan, **their benefits would be in danger of DISAPPEARING every five years!**

President Biden is standing firm to _**protect**_ Social Security and Medicare, so we've launched an urgent petition to PROVE that Americans stand with him -- _**but your signature is still missing! Please, before midnight:**_

**[Add your name to stand with President Biden in his fight to protect Social Security and Medicare from House Republicans >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12080?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230214-NewsAlert-SocialSecurityDoubleDown-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230214-NewsAlert-SocialSecurityDoubleDown-ETG-sl1&akid=9816%2E9716520%2EndAIen)**

name: Susan Wild

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I feel so lucky to be surrounded by so much love

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730813/392036378/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230214-1b-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RmOTQ3My1iNGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-tXme1FUDmkKAkRi-jsgRTds2jkF3WIEDdbM6iAgYQ=)
---
| Happy Valentine’s Day, Peter!

I feel so lucky to be surrounded by so much love – and today, I’m especially celebrating my love for Pennsylvania. **Before I get carried away telling you about how much I love my home district (and believe me, I can go on for a while!),[_I have to ask if you can invest $7 or more to ensure I have the resources to keep fighting for the 7th district in Congress._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730815/392036384/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230214-1b-EM&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RmOTQ3My1iNGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-tXme1FUDmkKAkRi-jsgRTds2jkF3WIEDdbM6iAgYQ=)**
---
| [CHIP IN $7 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730817/392036386/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230214-1b-EM&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RmOTQ3My1iNGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-tXme1FUDmkKAkRi-jsgRTds2jkF3WIEDdbM6iAgYQ=)
---
| [CHIP IN MORE! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730818/392036389/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230214-1b-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RmOTQ3My1iNGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-tXme1FUDmkKAkRi-jsgRTds2jkF3WIEDdbM6iAgYQ=)
---
Growing up in a military family, I never lived in one place for very long. When I moved to the Lehigh Valley more than 30 years ago, I fell in love with the community, and I knew this was where I wanted to stay and raise a family.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730819/392036390/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230214-1b-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzN2RmOTQ3My1iNGFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i-tXme1FUDmkKAkRi-jsgRTds2jkF3WIEDdbM6iAgYQ=)
My two children were born here and attended our public schools. I built my career here and became actively engaged in the community. So when I saw Washington politicians ignoring our voices, I knew I had to take a stand by running for Congress – and it is the honor of a lifetime to be serving my third term representing our district.

I think of my constituents as my extended family, and I care deeply about their struggles, their successes, and their future. My promise to you is that I will never stop advocating for families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the country. clean_body: I feel so lucky to be surrounded by so much love | = | Happy Valentine’s Day, Peter! I feel so lucky to be surrounded by so much love – and today, I’m especially celebrating my love for Pennsylvania. Before I get carried away telling you about how much I love my home district (and believe me, I can go on for a while!),= | = | = Growing up in a military family, I never lived in one place for very long. When I moved to the Lehigh Valley more than 30 years ago, I fell in love with the community, and I knew this was where I wanted to stay and raise a family. = My two children were born here and attended our public schools. I built my career here and became actively engaged in the community. So when I saw Washington politicians ignoring our voices, I knew I had to take a stand by running for Congress – and it is the honor of a lifetime to be serving my third term representing our district. I think of my constituents as my extended family, and I care deeply about their struggles, their successes, and their future. My promise to you is that I will never stop advocating for families and workers in Pennsylvania and across the country. = | = Thank you so much for having my back and Happy Valentine’s Day! ❤️, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Val Hoyle
subject: What it's like sharing a birthday with Oregon
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58730917/392036774/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjU3ODM2ZC1iNWFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vkb7HDzFLMU64dR_vEJrxvWGS41GteRsrdPpV3A0_I=&emci=79e56a5b-9aac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=eb57836d-b5ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, **Today's Oregon's birthday.** _It's also my birthday*._ Oregon is 164 years old today. _I'm not._ **I'm incredibly proud to call Oregon my home.** _I've been given the honor to represent Oregonians as a state legislator, a Labor Commissioner, and now a Congresswoman._ Oregon has mountains, high deserts, cities, river valleys, farms, forests, and 363 miles of the most beautiful coastline in the USA. **_That's why my husband and I moved here – many birthdays ago – to raise our children here, and why I can't imagine calling anyplace else 'home.'_** _I'm fighting for every beautiful inch of this state, whether it be protecting our wilderness, upgrading our infrastructure, or fighting for good-paying jobs._ Not many people get to share a birthday with their favorite place on Earth, and represent their home in Congress. I get to do both. **And it's the honor of a lifetime.** Thank you for sharing it with me, Peter. _Happy birthday Oregon._ In gratitude, _Val_ *It's also Valentine's Day, but let's not get carried away here. | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | |

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58731181/392037734/-131489862?sourceid=1048634&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTIwNmZiNS1iNmFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bNkWoNG7oG-Zcsk4Uqn-3DoV1B4EfncMfAK9N0FFaAE=&emci=9cd2f8b5-aeac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=79206fb5-b6ac-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

We are grateful to Sen. Dianne Feinstein for her lifetime of service. First elected to the U.S. Senate in 1992, Feinstein broke a glass ceiling by becoming the first woman to serve as U.S. senator from California. She went on to achieve many more firsts, including becoming the first woman to chair the Senate Rules and Intelligence committees and preside over a presidential inauguration.

Throughout her 30 years representing almost 40 million Californians, Feinstein has been a steadfast champion of gun violence prevention, tough government oversight to advance consumer protections and human rights, LGBTQ+ equality, and environmental protections. She was a critical voice promoting abortion rights and access to reproductive health care.

At EMILYs List, we salute Sen. Feinstein's dedication to the greater good.

Best,

Laphonza Butler
President, EMILYs List

|
---|---|---

clean_body: Peter, I recently watched Joe Biden deliver his State of the Union Address and...| | | Peter, I recently watched Joe Biden deliver his State of the Union Address, and I was appalled. | | His speech was full of blatant lies and half-truths about the current strength of our economy and country. That’s because Joe’s more interested in auditioning to run in 2024 than leading now. In contrast, our new conservative majority is laser-focused on leading. Since taking office in January, we... Defunded Biden’s 87,000 IRS Agents on Day 1. Launched Hearings into Big Tech, the Border Crisis, and Biden’s document scandal. Removed Ilhan Omar from her committee assignment for her anti-Semitic rhetoric ** Peter, while Joe’s already busy running for 2024, I’m working hard to reverse the Biden agenda and get America working for the people again. | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 378, Victor, NY 14564 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | |

Your support is an integral part of this work, friend. We wouldn’t be able to pass progressive legislation if not for DFLers like you, but we still need your help to continue this important work. Will you show your love to the House DFL with a contribution today and help us protect our majority?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Mayor Keith Pekau honors, praises Congresswoman Marie Newman
body:
During the pandemic Rep. Newman pushed masking and vaccinating kids. Mayor Pekau awards her with the Village's version of the Medal of Honor.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c2723f5c6cbd/alert-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-congresswoman-marie-newman?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau Honors, Praises Democrat Marie Newman Who Pushed for Vaccinating Children During Village Board Meeting (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During the January 16, 2023 Orland Park Village Board Meeting (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MyFime2PoLw&t=268s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , Republican Mayor Keith Pekau had a special VIP guest in the room – La Grange resident and former Democratic US Rep. Marie Newman, who was in town to receive the Orland Park Community Appreciation Award.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Orland Park Republican Mayor Keith Pekau and former Democratic US Congresswoman Marie Newman after Pekau presented her with a Community Appreciation Award on Jan. 16, 2023. (Village of Orland Park/YouTube)

“Congresswoman Newman and I disagree on a lot of things, we certainly disagree on the debt and all that over the last couple of years...”

But Pekau goes on to praise Newman for her assistance in securing $7 million in federal funding for the
143rd (https://www.orlandpark.org/departments/engineering-programs-and-services/143rd-street-widening-project?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) expansion project – a project to expand 143rd Street and widen it to five lanes.

“I’m grateful and thankful for former Congresswoman Newman’s help and support, as well as her personal call to inform me of the grant.”

During the pandemic, Newman and her husband Jim Newman owned shares in
Moderna (https://www.businessinsider.com/lawmakers-bought-sold-covid-19-related-stocks-during-pandemic-2021-12?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – the manufacturer of the Moderna COVID-19 vaccines and boosters. The shares also created the potential for conflicts of interests and accusations of profiting off the pandemic.

And so it is no surprise that Newman was supportive of vaccinating children during the pandemic, writing in a
Facebook post (https://www.facebook.com/MarieNewmanIL06/posts/4907784745899500/?paipv=0&eav=AfZZ4hhOUC3YcyNH0uCA6soUc0gWkCepNTH7Gj2-3jPnfKhGAFc3HuoUOvLqXIGn3pw&_rdr&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“The COVID-19 vaccine is now authorized for kids ages 5-11 in addition to everyone 12+. Vaccines are widely available across Illinois. Get vaccinated.”
https://www.facebook.com/MarieNewmanIL06/posts/4907784745899500?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Newman also secured $70 million (https://patch.com/illinois/oaklawn/newman-brings-70m-bolster-covid-vaccine-program-il-03?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in federal funding to boost the COVID-19 vaccine program in her district, issuing a statement at the time that read,

“I’m beyond thrilled to see these funds going directly to community health centers serving Illinois’ 3rd Congressional District and I know that each of my constituents will be as well. I could not be prouder to have voted for this landmark legislation. We will continue to build on this progress from here and ensure that every American has access to receiving their vaccine when it’s their time.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
President Joe Biden, D, and US Rep. Marie Newman, D, proudly wearing their face masks. (Marie Newman/Facebook)

In 2022, Newman also accepted campaign contributions from the American Federation of Teachers (https://www.opensecrets.org/members-of-congress/marie-newman/contributors?cid=N00040891&cycle=2022&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – one of her largest campaign contributors – and during the pandemic, the AFT issued a statement advocating for workplace vaccination policies, stating (https://www.aft.org/press-release/leading-teachers-union-passes-resolution-workplace-vaccine-policies?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“As educators, healthcare professionals and public employees, we play an important role in our communities, and the overwhelming majority of us are vaccinated. We will continue to advocate for masking, testing, and accurate science-based information about vaccinations to combat the rampant disinformation that’s literally killing American people. Vaccines work. Vaccines are safe. And vaccines save lives.”
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
US Rep. Marie Newman, D, installing a transgender pride flag in front of her congressional office in Washington, DC on Feb. 24, 2021. (RepMarieNewman/Twitter)

In 2021, Newman, whose daughter Evie (https://www.teenvogue.com/story/marie-newman-evie-lgbtq-rights?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) is transgender, had a transgender pride flag (https://abc7news.com/marie-newman-marjorie-taylor-greene-equality-act-daughter/10369965/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) installed in front of her office, in an apparent dig at her congressional neighbor and conservative colleague, US Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, tweeting (https://twitter.com/RepMarieNewman/status/1364658561809346564?s=20&t=6nC6o91XjLp3jhE80pGfVw&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“Our neighbor, @RepMTG, tried to block the Equality Act because she believes prohibiting discrimination against trans Americans is ‘disgusting, immoral, and evil.’ Thought we’d put up our Transgender flag so she can look at it every time she opens her door.”
https://twitter.com/RepMarieNewman/status/1364658561809346564?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

And while Pekau may disagree with Newman on the debt, as he stated in his opening speech during the Village Board Meeting, Illinois grassroots Republicans will certainly disagree with Newman on a whole lot more than just the debt – including advocating for the masking of and vaccination of adults and children; profiting during the pandemic; and her attacks on conservatives for opposing transgender rights.

But at least Pekau and Newman could set aside time last month and praise each other. In a Facebook post, Newman thanked Pekau for the award,
writing (https://www.facebook.com/100063570227410/posts/pfbid02EwFk5yUUosY9jKZg4RLcDoNJ2fBZ9VYFuAaihwq3QJiPvjjQPSMsS12hto3MZAsYl/?mibextid=cr9u03&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“Thank you to the Orland Park trustees, Mayor Keith Pekau & village staff for collaborating with my former team and I to bring $7 million to the 143rd expansion project. It was an honor to receive the Community Appreciation Award!”

Perhaps next time Newman can return the favor.
https://youtu.be/jgotBx-_QQ0?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Publisher Scott Kaspar and Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas discuss the State of the Union on "Mark My Words with Mark Vargas" on AM 560 The Answer (Feb. 12, 2023).
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8cb4d39a6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_14_08_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8cb4d39a6d-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

clean_body: During the pandemic Rep. Newman pushed masking and vaccinating kids. Mayor Pekau awards her with the Village's version of the Medal of Honor.

body:
Let’s set the record straight.

| |

| | | Let’s set the record straight.

I fired Ilhan Omar because she was hurling anti-semitic and anti-American Remarks across social media. This is UNACCEPTABLE behavior for a member of a committee representing America on the world stage.

I fired Eric Swalwell from the intelligence committee because he became entangled with a spy for the Chinese Communist party. I do not have to explain to you why this would be a conflict of interest for someone sitting on the Intelligence Committee.

I fired Adam Schiff from the Intelligence Committee because he spread lies about Donald Trump’s supposed involvement with Russia despite knowing them to be untrue at the time.
Adam Schiff leaked it?

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7da173beaaa4163b7960c6803fee147&_e=jPUauvoSvV2hS7E4bM3P6ucNS-jVBugPyucHOPH8kX3KFX_8t-9BltKoxhnBP-y5oi8O2GeN1NxvT2UQMYMHlmDaKaMVLKcdJKGAWc65QuDy3W8vXZVtOukC24WcQYDC_Grq7tfN4O72aJ2R2FwxZKW7lSxDzIKp5Im6sQ7B1j7mon9v1S_enHV27VMxhpD3cCc15nnCXbTBN0a1bZVpMM2JNz3T2pbI98Nmnrblb8jIJtgrXuQM2q4X4oOjsXUOL7pYb1aAZbIXx-pdqpysPAgkvDkpGkgnoV9JnboyYREuFAeeJ49sSOCPTgs4tooW1mp5fhZEPxej6lz602zrZOKiKjytDGyPmV0Tc26cF-JZe4AHxcgPVXP0MWam5ap-e3csYT4Fr1xKG7u8SrcATuKRtywr03EKUNmmG4Kv_fxBTymXIUx1Hst42eJdi_I5)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7da173beaaa4163b7960c6803fee147&_e=jPUauvoSvV2hS7E4bM3P6ucNS-jVBugPyucHOPH8kX3KFX_8t-9BltKoxhnBP-y5oi8O2GeN1NxvT2UQMYMHlmDaKaMVLKcdJKGAWc65QuDy3W8vXZVtOukC24WcQYDC_Grq7tfN4O72aJ2R2FwxZKW7lSxDzIKp5Im6sQ7B1j7mon9v1S_enHV27VMxhpD3cCc15nnCXbTBN0a1bZVpMM2JNz3T2pbI98Nmnrblb8jIJtgrXuQM2q4X4oOjsXUOL7pYb1aAZbIXx-pdqpysPLliXSoP4KuAROtV0Momgo-d2DrjB-GT2iYq1jqJl8GFTZRg2upPN8JxWIpWOjqS_YVSV_fBVOlzLbbYbWlQfO5zqgtbrEMjaY2GpY0MNveLUIoPzmDEubUWdNqRjAxJVABFLPvqgA9y0jhkdwgRztN5VL9iQPH1m5ope-PKOtJO)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7da173beaaa4163b7960c6803fee147&_e=jPUauvoSvV2hS7E4bM3P6ucNS-jVBugPyucHOPH8kX3KFX_8t-9BltKoxhnBP-y5oi8O2GeN1NxvT2UQMYMHlmDaKaMVLKcdJKGAWc65QuDy3W8vXZVtOukC24WcQYDC_Grq7tfN4O72aJ2R2FwxZKW7lSxDzIKp5Im6sQ7B1j7mon9v1S_enHV27VMxhpD3cCc15nnCXbTBN0a1bZVpMM2JNz3T2pbI98Nmnrblb8jIJtgrXuQM2q4X4oOjsXUOL7pYb1aAZbIXx-pdqpysPIiIgoR4Owt6aK-VCoOIvHSd6zx0_u0W6Shbj60QsqzM4s6cleBvz4uMoCvRv6tSGMm4ZpjpekYOqH8p6TtP2ufZUdNPO_WA3CPj5KxpPunGoNagd2C_d9dqOO54lP-SqrMwxyQMZH0YTHII9PY2N8TfNpPnrE9Bgkn-WODEAWZj)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e7da173beaaa4163b7960c6803fee147&_e=jPUauvoSvV2hS7E4bM3P6ucNS-jVBugPyucHOPH8kX3KFX_8t-9BltKoxhnBP-y5oi8O2GeN1NxvT2UQMYMHlmDaKaMVLKcdJKGAWc65QuDy3W8vXZVtOukC24WcQYDC_Grq7tfN4O72aJ2R2FwxZKW7lSxDzIKp5Im6sQ7B1j7mon9v1S_enHV27VMxhpD3cCc15nnCXbTBN0a1bZVpMM2JNz3T2pbI98Nmnrblb8jIJtgrXuQM2q4X4oOjsXUOL7pYb1aAZbIXx-pdqpysPFg_qjJkSRUJ5WkqvaYUxaXCzi7_P2KhjX-Krw6hxjgdnrXpS9BHY-LrScBC-gH8zPknO64ineluAvUVMlFVzNZ9EIrNOXCWhHeW4knxjbOWFw4UX1I5AoKmR-soN3PmfBvxhWrPP-jmsetKxKBkNDQ1nR7SIONfmJcHHFwniqa8).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Chrissy Houlahan
subject: a lifelong love of science
body:
I have a lifelong love of science, Derek.
| | |
---
**I have a lifelong love of science, Derek. **

As a college student, I went to Stanford to study engineering on an ROTC scholarship to follow in Sally Ride's footsteps and become an astronaut. After school, I joined the Air Force, serving as a program engineer on anti-ballistic missile defense programs. I earned my MS in Technology and Policy from MIT. Later on I taught high school chemistry in North Philadelphia.
If there's one thing my decades in STEM have taught me, it's that science and politics aren't as different as they might seem. Today we need leaders who look to the data, suss out potential biases, and reject misinformation. And as the climate crisis continues to threaten America and the world, we need science-based solutions.
**That's why I have a track record of working with colleagues from across the ideological spectrum to find real solutions to the severe problems we face today:**
* We launched the******first-ever Women in STEM Caucus** to support women pursuing STEM careers because STEM education is a driving force behind our economy.

* I co-chair the **Bipartisan Climate Solutions Caucus** – the only bipartisan climate caucus in Congress.

* I helped to pass the **Inflation Reduction Act** , which makes historic investments in clean energy and is expected to reduce emissions by approximately 40% by 2030.

* Did you know our district is home to multiple semiconductor manufacturers? I helped pass the **CHIPS Act** , which made our supply chains more resilient and helped us to outcompete China.

But our work is far from over. Too many Republicans have opposed the scientific consensus on issues ranging from COVID-19 to climate change, economic strategy, and even the nonpartisan counting of ballots.

**Too many in the GOP don't listen to the data; instead, they promote misinformation and conspiracy theories. But I'm committed to making the facts shine through, and I'm ready to get back to work for the country and PA-06.**
**[Please, Derek, can I count on you to donate $5 now and help me ensure that our path to progress continues?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58733071/392044409/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk785-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMDgyNzg3Yy1iZmFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f3ROWDVcnkdI5ZJmHEKCV8rJLcUMq-DGXFIIdh3RD1M=)**

clean_body: I have a lifelong love of science, Derek. | | | I have a lifelong love of science, Derek. As a college student, I went to Stanford to study engineering on an ROTC scholarship to follow in Sally Ride's footsteps and become an astronaut. After school, I joined the Air Force, serving as a program engineer on anti-ballistic missile defense programs. I earned my MS in Technology and Policy from MIT. Later on I taught high school chemistry in North Philadelphia. If there's one thing my decades in STEM have taught me, it's that science and politics aren't as different as they might seem. Today we need leaders who look to the data, suss out potential biases, and reject misinformation. And as the climate crisis continues to threaten America and the world, we need science-based solutions. That's why I have a track record of working with colleagues from across the ideological spectrum to find real solutions to the severe problems we face today: We launched the**first-ever Women in STEM Caucus to support women pursuing STEM careers because STEM education is a driving force behind our economy. I co-chair the Bipartisan Climate Solutions Caucus – the only bipartisan climate caucus in Congress. I helped to pass the Inflation Reduction Act , which makes historic investments in clean energy and is expected to reduce emissions by approximately 40% by 2030. Did you know our district is home to multiple semiconductor manufacturers? I helped pass the CHIPS Act , which made our supply chains more resilient and helped us to outcompete China. But our work is far from over. Too many Republicans have opposed the scientific consensus on issues ranging from COVID-19 to climate change, economic strategy, and even the nonpartisan counting of ballots. Too many in the GOP don't listen to the data; instead, they promote misinformation and conspiracy theories. But I'm committed to making the facts shine through, and I'm ready to get back to work for the country and PA-06. =** | | = There's work to be done. – Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. | | Peter,

I am officially running again to defeat Lauren Boebert!

In 2022, we came just 546 votes short of kicking Boebert out of Congress. It was the closest race in the entire country. Now, I’m running again to finish the job, but I need you with me from day one:

[**_Please, will you make a split donation now between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia to become a Founding Donor to my 2024 campaign to defeat Boebert?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58733334/392045509/729998634?refcode=20230214.2_AF_2LB&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzZjNGQxNy1jMmFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObvxzeW-r4_U11Jh5cYMcemyUOgvqsbmbpe_SNxkw_Q=)_**

No one believed we could pull it off in 2022. All of the pundits said Colorado’s 3rd congressional district was a “Safe Republican” seat. The national Democrats and the national Republicans wrote us off.

But we proved them all wrong.

With Lauren Boebert now on notice, this campaign is going to get even nastier. Her Super PACs and supporters are going to spin lie after lie against me on TV. I’m counting on your support to help me correct the record and hold Boebert accountable.

[**_No amount is too small: Click here now and split a donation between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia. It’s important that we have as strong of an early showing as possible.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58733335/392045510/729998634?refcode=20230214.2_AF_2LB&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzZjNGQxNy1jMmFjLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObvxzeW-r4_U11Jh5cYMcemyUOgvqsbmbpe_SNxkw_Q=)_

I never could have done it last time without supporters and donors like you. I am eternally grateful to have you alongside me again, and together, we can defeat extremism across the country – in Colorado, Georgia, and beyond.

With gratitude -
Adam

## **Happy Tuesday![ Check out the results of the CaucusRoom Straw Poll.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-y/) Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-t/) **What is Going On?** Democratic and Republican lawmakers**[are demanding President Biden provide "maximum transparency" ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-i/)**on what the administration learns about the now four unidentified flying objects that have been shot down over the U.S. and Canada in recent days. Air Force General VanHerck says **[he hasn't ruled out aliens.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-d/)** **Everyone Is Doing It**
## **[China says the U.S. violated their airspace multiple times](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-h/)** in the last year with similar balloons but U.S. officials say that is false.
**Star Spangled Banner Gets Ecstatic Reception** Country music star**[Chris Stapleton lit up Super Bowl LVII's pregame with a moving rendition of the "Star Spangled Banner"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-k/) **that brought fans, coaches and players to tears. **Biden Selling More Petroleum Reserves** The**[Biden administration announced another sale of oil from the Dept. of Energy's Strategic Petroleum Reserve](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-u/), **with 26 million barrels set to be delivered to the market. **U.S. Citizens Warned** The **[United States has warned citizens to leave Russia immediately](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-o/)** due to the risk of arrest or harassment by Russian law enforcement. **Cancel This!** **[Roseanna Barr is making a comeback](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-x/)** on Fox Nation with a new stand-up special called Cancel This!

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-m/)!**
* This man is **[doing the lord's work](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-c/)**.
* **[Things look different](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-q/) **from Canada.
* The aliens **[can't land](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-a/)**.
* Oh, shoot. I was so [**excited to go for a ride**.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhdthuk-trhiujldw-f/)
